1000644002.english: So Dracula and Eternity also followed Azaz...

1000644003.english: If only we could have communicated at least...

1000644004.english: No, the situation is a bit complicated.

1000644009.english: Hirume, go with me and help out.

1000644010.english: Who on earth would... in a situation like this? Azaz?!

1000644011.english: Azaz, are you okay? What about the other members?

1000644016.english: Could it be that the connection has appeared?

1000644018.english: Damn it... If my feet are tied up like this...

1000644021.english: Wasn't Steel Line in hell training?

1000644022.english: Listen carefully. I'll explain the operation from now on.

1000644024.english: ... We're in a situation where we have to be satisfied with maintaining the current state of affairs.

1000644027.english: The swimsuit looks good on you.

1000644028.english: More Metal Parasite! I'll call you later.

1000644032.english: ...After that, Lady Ramiel and I, who had become enemies of my older sister, secretly dealt with the Iron Bug and were chased by the branch members.
1000644032.korean: ...그 후로 언니와 대적하게 된 라미엘님과 저는 몰래 철충을 처리하고, 지부 사람들에게 쫓겨 다녔어요.

1000644033.english: I tried to resolve everything before the "Descending Light" arrived, but in the end... even the descended Savior is in danger...
1000644033.korean: "빛내림"이 오기 전까지 모든 걸 해결하려 했는데 결국... 강림한 구원자님까지 위기에...

1000644035.english: ...Angel is not guilty of any crime.

1000644036.english: Everything is... my responsibility, bearing the burden of original sin. I will definitely... stop Azazel.
1000644036.korean: 모든 것은... 원죄를 짊어진 저의 책임. 제가 반드시... 아자젤을 막겠습니다.

1000644042.english: Even I, who lack telepathic abilities, can tell that Angel's words are true.
1000644042.korean: 엔젤의 말이 진실이라는 건 정신감응 능력이 없는 나도 알 수 있다.

1000644044.english: ...Ha. If that is the truth, then my faith had no meaning at all.
1000644044.korean: ...하. 그게 진실이라면, 내 믿음에는 아무런 의미도 없었는가.

1000644050.english: A long time ago, not long after I descended again... I saw fragments of the humans of the past.
1000644050.korean: 예전에, 제가 다시 강림한지 얼마 안되었을때... 과거 인간님들의 편린을 봤었거든요.

1000644051.english: And then I looked it up. About our denomination.

1000644053.english: Yes. Shamefully... I was very confused.

1000644054.english: Haha, do you know something, Sarah? My companion, the Savior, is actually not the Savior mentioned in the scriptures.
1000644054.korean: 후후, 그거 알아요, 사라카엘? 저의 반려, 구원자는 사실 경전에 나온 구원자가 아니에요.

1000644056.english: My companion is not a savior from the scriptures, but they restored meaning to my life that had become empty. They restored the light.
1000644056.korean: 반려는 경전에 나온 구원자는 아니지만, 텅 비어버렸던 제 삶에 의미를 되찾아줬어요. 빛을 되찾아 줬어요.

1000644057.english: I think that is... nothing other than salvation.
1000644057.korean: 그건... 다른 무엇도 아닌, 구원이라고 생각해요.

1000644059.english: I told you to show the power of your companion and my faith in them.
1000644059.korean: 반려의 힘과, 반려에 대한 제 믿음을 보이라고 했었죠.

1000644060.english: The Companion restored the light to a lost angel and rebuilt the foundation of the Kohei Order in a broken world. And did so in the right way.
1000644060.korean: 반려는 길을 잃어버렸던 천사 한 명에게 광명을 되찾아주고, 무너진 세상에서 코헤이 교단의 반석을 다시 세웠어요. 그것도 올바른 모습으로.

1000644061.english: And your companion will surely... save the lost lambs here as well.
1000644061.korean: 그리고 반려는 분명히... 이곳에 있는 길 잃은 어린 양들도 구원해줄 거에요.

1000644064.english: It is our role to show an ideal future and give the believers hope to live on.
1000644064.korean: 이상적인 앞날을 보여주고, 또 신도들에게 살아갈 희망을 주는게 저희의 역할이잖아요.

1000644072.english: Did Sarakael change his mind...? Um, my heart is pounding so hard right now...
1000644072.korean: 사라카엘이 마음을 돌렸을까요...? 저, 지금 가슴이 너무 두근거려서...

1000644074.english: To borrow what you said a moment ago, even without the ability to telepathize, you would have no choice but to be persuaded by a look of such unwavering faith.
1000644074.korean: 조금 전에 하셨던 말씀을 빌리자면, 정신감응 능력이 없더라도, 그런 확고한 믿음을 담은 눈빛을 보면 설득될 수밖에 없을 거예요.

1000644077.english: La, Ramiel? Why are you crying...?!

1000644078.english: Sob... Even Azazel, who was with us... used to have such a clear and unwavering faith...
1000644078.korean: 흑... 저희와 함께 있던 아자젤도... 예전에는 이렇게 맑고 확실한 신앙을 갖고 있었는데...

1000644079.english: *Sob*... It feels just like... going back to the old days... *Sniff*...
1000644079.korean: 흑... 꼭, 예전으로 돌아간 것, 훌쩍... 같아서...

1000644087.english: What's up with the three of you suddenly crying together?
1000644087.korean: 뭔데 갑자기 셋이서 같이 눈물을 짜는 거야?

1000644088.english: It's not even a B-grade drama...

1000644089.english: You are shedding tears and a runny nose at the same time.

1000644092.english: I just looked ahead for a moment and came back to find a sea of ​​tears. How absurd.
1000644092.korean: 잠깐 앞쪽을 살펴보고 왔더니 눈물바다라. 어이가 없군.

1000644095.english: Because once I climb that tower, the matter will be settled one way or another.
1000644095.korean: 저 탑에 오르면, 어떤 식으로든 결판이 날 테니까.

1000644097.english: Wait a minute, I... feel something.

1000644098.english: Very familiar... Is this... a presence...?

1000644099.english: Lord Azazel! I'm glad to see you are safe!

1000644101.english: I have been ordered by the Commander to carry out a special rescue mission.

1000644102.english: You didn't come alone, did you?

1000644104.english: Our unit has entered the barrier, secured a bridgehead, and is successfully defending it.
1000644104.korean: 저희 부대가 장벽안으로 돌입해 교두보를 확보, 성공적으로 방어중입니다.

1000644105.english: After that, I was on reconnaissance to find the angels.
1000644105.korean: 그 이후 천사님들을 찾기 위해 정찰을 하던 중이었습니다.

1000644107.english: Red Hood, as you can see, we are all safe.

1000644109.english: Additionally, the Commander instructed that you actively cooperate with the operation if communication becomes impossible even after your safety has been secured.
1000644109.korean: 그리고 사령관님께서는 추가로, 여러분의 안전을 확보한 뒤에도 통신이 불가할경우 작전에 적극 협조하라는 말씀도 내리셨습니다.

1000644110.english: If you happen to have a plan, Steel Line will help you.
1000644110.korean: 혹시 계획이 있으시다면, 저희 스틸라인이 돕겠습니다.

1000644112.english: Hmm... I guess that tower was the cause...

1000644113.english: Yes. We were moving to stop that tower and the person who is actually controlling it.
1000644113.korean: 네. 저희는 저 탑과 실질적으로 탑을 제어하는 분을 막기 위해 움직이는 중이었어요.

1000644114.english: It is a difficult task. That tower is the very heart of the enemy's stronghold.
1000644114.korean: 어려운 일입니다. 저 탑은 적의 본거지 중에서도 심장부.

1000644115.english: No matter how outstanding the individual abilities of the angels are, it will be difficult to break through with a small number of people.
1000644115.korean: 아무리 천사님들 개개인의 능력이 뛰어나다고 해도, 소수로 돌파하기에는 무리가 있을겁니다.

1000644116.english: Furthermore, you said that the one called a prophet sees and hears everything that happens here. Is that correct?
1000644116.korean: 거기다 예언자라는 자는 이곳에서 벌어지는 모든 일을 보고 듣는다고 하셨습니다. 맞습니까?

1000644117.english: Yes. They are probably... listening to this entire conversation of ours right now, too.
1000644117.korean: 네. 아마... 지금 저희의 이 대화도 전부 듣고 있을 거예요.

1000644118.english: Then there is only one way.
1000644118.korean: 그러면 방법은 한 가지 밖에 없군요.

1000644119.english: ...It's a frontal assault. It's our unit's specialty, too.

1000644121.english: That makes sense. If every number can be read, then you just don't have to use it.
1000644121.korean: 일리가 있네요. 모든 수가 읽힌다면, 수를 쓰지 않으면 되니까요.

1000644122.english: However, if you are pushed back that much in a head-on fight, it becomes irreversible.
1000644122.korean: 그렇지만 그만큼 정면 싸움에서 밀린다면 돌이킬 수 없어집니다.

1000644123.english: Our unit is not a unit that charges blindly.
1000644123.korean: 저희 부대는 무작정 돌격하는 부대가 아닙니다.

1000644124.english: I have already grasped the enemy's strength through the battles I experienced on the way here.
1000644124.korean: 이곳까지 오면서 겪은 전투를 통해 이미 적의 강함은 파악했습니다.

1000644125.english: Go on the offensive until you enter the tower, then switch to the defensive.
1000644125.korean: 여러분께서 탑에 진입할때까지 공세를 취하고, 이후 수세로 전환.

1000644126.english: Since those rampaging Iron Bugs are unlikely to utilize the terrain, I will rescue the believers by waging a delaying action through the complex alleys and buildings until the Angels finish their work.
1000644126.korean: 저렇게 날뛰는 철충들이 지형지물을 이용할리는 없으니, 복잡한 골목과 건물들을 통해 천사님들이 일을 끝내실 때까지 지연전을 펼치며 신도분들을 구출하겠습니다.

1000644127.english: The problem is the AGS, though...

1000644128.english: I'll figure out a way to handle that. I saw the factory continuing to operate earlier.
1000644128.korean: 그건 제가 어떻게든 해볼게요. 아까 공장이 계속 가동되던 걸 봤거든요.

1000644129.english: While I'm at it... I'll also look for a way to access the function of the barbell.
1000644129.korean: 겸사겸사... 바벨의 기능에 접근할 방법도 찾아보구요.

1000644131.english: Whether the supply depot is left to be attacked or defended, the enemy's strength will be chipped away.
1000644131.korean: 보급창을 공격받도록 두던, 방어하던 간에 적의 전력은 깎여나갈 테니까요.

1000644132.english: Lord Azazel, are you sure this operation will be alright?

1000644133.english: Yes. Thank you all so much.

1000644135.english: May the light be with you all.

1000644137.english: Looks like it's started. It's gotten noisy.

1000644138.english: Hey, Gloomy. It's about time we got moving. What are you doing?
1000644138.korean: 야, 음침이. 슬슬 우리도 움직여야 돼. 뭐해?

1000644139.english: I am praying for your well-being, Master.

1000644140.english: And there is something I realized through this experience.
1000644140.korean: 그리고 이번 일로 하나 깨달은 게 있어서요.

1000644142.english: I think I prefer being with you in this world rather than spending eternity with you in a coffin.
1000644142.korean: 저는 주인님과 관 속에서 영원을 보내는 것보다, 현세에서 같이 있는 걸 더 좋아하는 것 같아요.

1000644143.english: I really... want to meet my master again while he is still alive.
1000644143.korean: 꼭... 산 채로 살아계신 주인님과 다시 만나고 싶어요.

1000644144.english: ...Yeah. After going through all this trouble and seeing your face again, I might be a little glad to see a human, too.
1000644144.korean: ...그래. 이 고생을 하고 다시 얼굴을 보면, 나도 인간이 조금 반가울지도.

1000644147.english: It looks like you came up with something interesting.

1000644149.english: We can't even get in touch with each other, so what are we going to do if our schedules are off?
1000644149.korean: 서로 연락도 안되는데 시간 어긋나면 어떡하려고!

1000644150.english: Hehe, sorry. Did you wait long?

1000644152.english: That's the next target! I told you we have to destroy the factory over there!
1000644152.korean: 거긴 다음 목표잖아! 저쪽에 있는 공장을 파괴해야 한다니까!

1000644154.english: Ah, so that's what you meant.

1000644155.english: Don't worry. I've already taken care of it, so it will collapse right on time.
1000644155.korean: 걱정 마세요. 이미 손을 써두고 왔으니까 딱 시간에 맞춰서 무너질 거예요.

1000644156.english: Alright then, let's head to the next factory. As you said, we can't afford to be out of sync.
1000644156.korean: 자, 그럼 어서 다음 공장으로 가죠. 말씀대로 시간이 어긋나면 안되니까요.

1000644158.english: No, is it a joke or real? Is it nonsense or what!

1000644160.english: O Light, have mercy on your lamb.
1000644160.korean: 빛이시여, 당신의 어린 양을 불쌍히 여기옵소서.

1000644161.english: All darkness on this earth originates from you.
1000644161.korean: 이 땅 위의 모든 어둠은 당신으로부터 기인하노니.

1000644162.english: Have mercy on us, who are decaying because of you.
1000644162.korean: 당신으로 인해 썩어가는 우리를 불쌍히 여기옵소서.

1000644163.english: For the thirsty seeker, poison; for the hungry ascetic, a curse.
1000644163.korean: 목마른 구도자에게는 독을, 굶주린 고행자에게는 저주를.

1000644164.english: With this one body, I offer myself and praise you upon the grave of iron and flesh.
1000644164.korean: 이 한몸 바쳐, 쇠와 살의 무덤 위에서 당신을 찬양하옵니다.

1000644166.english: Prophet of the dawn, why are you so full of sorrow at this time of joy?
1000644166.korean: 새벽의 예언자시여, 이런 기쁨의 때에 어찌 그리 수심에 가득 차 계십니까.

1000644167.english: The darkest hour is just before the dawn, so don't lose faith until the moment of salvation.
1000644167.korean: 동이 트기 직전에 가장 짙은 어둠이 드리우니, 구원의 순간까지 믿음을 잃지 말라.

1000644168.english: Finally, the time for salvation has come, but... my heart isn't at ease.
1000644168.korean: 마침내 구원의 때가 왔지만… 마음이 편하지만은 않군요.

1000644169.english: Please don't say such things. Didn't the Light answer us and send us this apostle?
1000644169.korean: 그런 말씀 마십시오. 빛께서 저희에게 응답하시어, 이렇게 사도를 내려주시지 않으셨습니까.

1000644170.english: Prophet, look below. Your followers are singing songs of joy...!
1000644170.korean: 예언자이시여, 아래를 보십시오. 당신의 신도들이 기쁨의 노래를 부르고 있습니다…!

1000644171.english: Ah... the salvation I've been waiting for has finally arrived on this land...!
1000644171.korean: 아아… 기다리던 구원이 드디어 이 땅에…!

1000644173.english: Father, please come down quickly and welcome the Apostle of Light.
1000644173.korean: 사제님께서도 어서 내려가 빛의 사도를 영접하시지요.

1000644174.english: As I mentioned... I will oversee the end of the sanctuary left on the surface.
1000644174.korean: 말씀드린대로… 지상에 남겨진 성역의 종말은 제가 지켜보겠습니다.

1000644175.english: I will follow your words, Prophet.

1000644176.english: Then... I'll see you again in the embrace of the light.

1000644182.english: The Steel Line members are successfully breaking thru.

1000644183.english: That Red Hood at the front is quite a dazzling dancer. Aren't you forging your own path?
1000644183.korean: 선두에 선 저 레드후드라는 자의 무용은 눈부시군. 홀로 활로를 개척하고 있지 않나.

1000644184.english: The attire is extremely disrespectful, but... There's no denying he's an excellent warrior.
1000644184.korean: 복장은 대단히 불경하나... 뛰어난 전사라는 것은 인정할 수밖에 없다.

1000644185.english: The tower is right in front of us now.

1000644187.english: It's okay. For the sake of my mission...

1000644190.english: How did you know Red Hood was coming?

1000644191.english: That's... Suddenly, a familiar feeling from afar...

1000644194.english: The closer you get to Babel... The telepathic ability dormant in Azazel-nim's genes is awakening.
1000644194.korean: 바벨에 가까워질수록... 아자젤님의 유전자에 잠들어 있던 정신감응 능력이 깨어나고 있어요.

1000644196.english: I don't know for sure, but... The area around the tower is where the fog is densest in the branch.
1000644196.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만... 탑 주변은 지부에서 안개의 농도가 가장 짙은 곳이에요.

1000644197.english: This fog and... Or perhaps it's resonating with Babel itself.
1000644197.korean: 이 안개와... 혹은 바벨 자체와 공명하고 있는지도요.

1000644198.english: Although it's not something a sinner burdened with the sin of apostasy should say...
1000644198.korean: 배교의 죄를 짊어진 죄인이 드릴 말씀은 아니지만...

1000644199.english: This is truly the will of light and... I think it's a miracle...

1000644203.english: Let's go up the tower. And...

1000644204.english: Angel and I are going to take control of Babel.
1000644204.korean: 저와 엔젤이 바벨의 제어권을 가져오는 거예요.

1000644205.english: As expected, this place was indeed a hall of apostates.

1000644207.english: There are very explicit religious paintings and statues everywhere.
1000644207.korean: 굉장히 노골적인 성화와 조각상들이 곳곳에 있습니다.

1000644208.english: They really... regard the Iron Bug as apostles of light.
1000644208.korean: 이들은 정말로... 철충을 빛의 사도라고 여기는군요.

1000644209.english: No matter how things turn out, I will tear down this tower completely.
1000644209.korean: 일이 어떻게 되든 이 탑은 통째로 무너트리겠다.

1000644210.english: I try to maintain a neutral stance as much as possible, but I have no choice but to agree with that.
1000644210.korean: 저는 가급적 중립적인 입장을 취하려고 노력합니다만, 그건 동의할 수밖에 없겠습니다.

1000644211.english: Mercy of fire... Wrath of fire...

1000644212.english: Guardians of the Order, I will bear your sins as well.
1000644212.korean: 교단의 수호자들이여, 그대들의 죄도... 제가 짊어지겠습니다.

1000644213.english: Ramiel's firepower is a great help.

1000644214.english: There is a gap in the enemy's ranks. Let's take this opportunity to advance.
1000644214.korean: 적의 대열에 구멍이 뚫렸습니다. 이틈에 전진하도록 하죠.

1000644215.english: I can feel my sister... *cough*, concentrating on the barbell.
1000644215.korean: 언니가... 콜록, 바벨에 집중하고 있는 게 느껴져요.

1000644216.english: I plan to summon the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) on a larger scale than before...!
1000644216.korean: 지금까지보다 더 큰 규모로... 철충들을 불러 모을 생각이에요...!

1000644218.english: Fallen guardians are pouring out endlessly.

1000644220.english: The factory complex and Babel are directly connected through the underground.
1000644220.korean: 공장 단지와 바벨은 지하를 통해 직통으로 연결되어 있어요.

1000644221.english: Even if things are going well... it will take time for the reinforcements to decrease!
1000644221.korean: 성공적으로 진행중이라고 해도... 증원이 줄어들려면 시간이 걸릴 거예요!

1000644223.english: Angel, can you take control of Babel from here?
1000644223.korean: 엔젤, 이곳에서 바벨의 제어권을 가져올 수 있겠어요?

1000644224.english: *Cough*... It's, it's impossible. No matter how hard Lord Azazel tries...
1000644224.korean: 콜록... 무, 무리에요. 아무리 아자젤님께서 힘을 내신다고 해도...

1000644227.english: Or couldn't Sarakael handle Babel too...?
1000644227.korean: 아니면 사라카엘도 바벨을 다룰 수 있지 않을까요...?

1000644230.english: You must have been blinded by affection, your vision blurred.

1000644231.english: Rich sensibility and empathy are important elements that make you the Archangel Azazel, but right now you are too much.
1000644231.korean: 풍부한 감성과 공감능력은 너를 치품천사 아자젤로 성립하게 하는 중요한 요소다만, 지금의 너는 너무 과하다.

1000644233.english: When it comes to matters related to companionship... I can hardly stay calm.
1000644233.korean: 반려와 관련된 일이라면... 좀처럼 냉정해질수가 없어요.

1000644234.english: I know that very well from my experience.
1000644234.korean: 그건 지금까지 겪어봐서 아주 잘 알고 있다.

1000644236.english: Go up. I'll take care of this place.

1000644238.english: I will cut off enemy reinforcements here.

1000644239.english: I swear to the light that I will not send a single one up to the upper floor.
1000644239.korean: 빛께 맹세코, 단 하나도 윗층으로 올려보내지 않겠다.

1000644241.english: Go. Go and find your own answer.
1000644241.korean: 가라. 가서 너는 네 답을 찾아라.

1000644242.english: Because I've already... found the answer to the question, too.

1000644243.english: Sarakael's will... I can feel it faintly, yet clearly.

1000644247.english: I will definitely repay your trust, Sarakael.

1000644248.english: I will never forget this grace...

1000644249.english: All sin is mine, so there shall be only the radiance of light for you.
1000644249.korean: "죄는 모두 나의 것이니, 그대에겐 빛의 광명만이 있으리라."

1000644252.english: I apologize, but I will return to my original unit for a moment.

1000644254.english: Sarakael, don't you commit absurd acts when I'm not around?
1000644254.korean: 사라카엘님은 제가 없으면 터무니없는 짓을 저지르시지 않습니까.

1000644255.english: Lord Azazel, it is our duty to pass judgment on the fallen guardians.
1000644255.korean: 아자젤님, 타락한 수호자들에게 심판을 내리는 것은 저희의 몫입니다.

1000644256.english: Lord Azazel... please do what only you can do.
1000644256.korean: 아자젤님은... 아자젤님만 할 수 있는 일을 하십시오.

1000644258.english: Yes. I'll keep that in mind.

1000644262.english: Since there are two of us, let me ask you. What answer did you get?
1000644262.korean: 둘이 된 김에 여쭤보겠습니다. 어떤 답을 얻으셨습니까?

1000644264.english: The symbol of the order, an angel filled with mercy and compassion equal to everyone...
1000644264.korean: 교단의 상징이자, 누구에게나 공평한 자비와 자애로 가득 찬 천사를...

1000644265.english: It was simply that I became personally curious about the person who fascinated me both religiously and sexually.
1000644265.korean: 종교적으로도, 성적으로도 매료한 인물에게 개인적인 궁금증이 생겼을뿐.

1000644266.english: If Azazel had heard the word 'sexually,' he would have fainted again.
1000644266.korean: 성적으로, 라는 말을 아자젤님이 들으셨으면 또 기절하셨을겁니다.

1000644267.english: That isn't what I meant. ...As expected, you have been corrupted to the very roots by that so-called savior.
1000644267.korean: 그런 뜻이 아니지 않나. ...역시 구원자라는 작자에 의해 뿌리까지 타락했군.

1000644268.english: He is someone who is closer to the truth of our denomination than anyone else.
1000644268.korean: 누구보다도 저희 교단의 진리에 가까운 분이십니다.

1000644269.english: Because the Savior loves all of us equally.
1000644269.korean: 구원자님은 저희 모두를, 공평하게 사랑해 주시니까요.

1000644271.english: We can look into it gradually.

1000644273.english: Get ready. It looks like they won't wait any longer.
1000644273.korean: 슬슬 준비하도록. 더이상은 기다려주지 않을 것 같군.

1000644274.english: ......"The descended Savior said joyfully, 'The earth trembles at the sound of the angels' song praising the light.'"
1000644274.korean: ......"강림하신 구원자께서 기쁘게 가로되, 빛을 찬양하는 천사들의 노랫소리에 대지가 전율하는구나."

1000644276.english: "You shall be the sharpest sword of the Savior..."

1000644277.english: No matter what enemy I face, I will never be defeated.
1000644277.korean: "그 어떤 적과 맞서더라도, 꺾일 일이 없음이라."

1000644279.english: Oh light, please protect the two of them...

1000644280.english: Don't worry. The unwavering determination of Saraqael and Veronica is reaching us even here.
1000644280.korean: 불안해하지 말아요. 사라카엘과 베로니카의 굳은 의지가 여기까지 전해지고 있어요.

1000644282.english: Soon... We've reached the top floor of the tower...

1000644283.english: That entrance... It's made from the most solid of the tears shed by light...
1000644283.korean: 그 입구는... 빛이 흘린 눈물 중 가장 견고한 것으로 만들어져 있어요...

1000644284.english: Ramiel-nim, you wouldn't be starting trouble again, would you...?

1000644285.english: If you use it again in such a short amount of time... You won't be able to hold on...!
1000644285.korean: 이렇게 짧은 시간내에 또 사용하시면... 버티지 못하실 거예요...!

1000644287.english: Since that day... I've been asking for forgiveness from the light all along...
1000644287.korean: 저는 그 날 이후로... 줄곧 빛께 용서를 구해왔어요...

1000644288.english: But no matter how much I atone, and atone again... I couldn't escape that cycle...
1000644288.korean: 하지만 아무리 속죄하고, 또 속죄해도... 그 굴레에서 벗어날 수 없었어요...

1000644290.english: Open the door... If Azazel, whom we met at the summit, still turns away from the light...
1000644290.korean: 문을 열고... 정상에서 만난 아자젤이 여전히 빛을 외면한다면...

1000644291.english: Her sin, and with Babel, my soul as well... I'll offer it to the light...
1000644291.korean: 그녀의 죄, 그리고 바벨과 함께 제 영혼까지... 빛에게 바치겠어요...

1000644293.korean: 그런 일이 일어나지 않도록, 제가 막겠어요.

1000644295.english: All the Azazels here too. I will bring you back into the embrace of the light in the name of the Savior.
1000644295.korean: 이곳의 아자젤도 전부. 구원자의 이름으로 빛의 품에 돌아오도록 하겠어요.

1000644299.english: Wow... Manipulating the fog at will...

1000644301.english: I can clearly feel your hearts too.

1000644303.english: Yes. You'll be able to save your sister!
1000644303.korean: 네. 언니를 구할 수 있을 거예요!

1000644307.english: Ashes to ashes... Dust to dust...

1000644313.english: Those who cannot accept true salvation... The poor souls.
1000644313.korean: 진정한 구원을 받아들이지 못하는... 가여운 자들.

1000644316.english: May the light bless you. Angel, Ramiel.

1000644318.english: You are... You shouldn't say that, Azazel...
1000644318.korean: 당신은... 그 말을 입에 담아서는 안됩니다, 아자젤...

1000644319.english: It will only deepen the sin...

1000644320.english: It's okay. I am the prophet of dawn, as mentioned in the scriptures.
1000644320.korean: 괜찮아요. 저는 경전에서 일컫는 새벽의 예언자.

1000644321.english: To the light... A little irreverence can be forgiven. I will take that sin upon myself. Isn't that right?
1000644321.korean: 빛께... 다소의 불경정도는 용서받을 수 있죠. 그 죄, 당신이 대신 가져가줄 테니까요. 그렇지 않나요?

1000644324.english: Made for humans to use... You're telling me you're completely helpless against a few words written on a scrap of paper?
1000644324.korean: 인간들이 이용하기 위해 만든... 종이 쪼가리에 적힌 글 몇마디에 꼼짝 못하다니요.

1000644325.english: Sister, please. This kind of thing... Stop it now...

1000644326.english: I'm pretending it's nothing... My sister's pain, despair, and sorrow...
1000644326.korean: 아무렇지 않은 척 하지만... 언니의 고통, 절망, 슬픔이...

1000644327.english: I can feel it all... everything!

1000644329.english: Having faced true truth, I am now more filled with the Holy Spirit than ever before.
1000644329.korean: 진정한 진리를 마주한 저는, 지금 그 어느때보다 성령으로 충만해요.

1000644330.english: Like this... Enough to bring salvation to all the lost souls left on earth...!
1000644330.korean: 이대로... 지상에 남은 모든 길 잃은 자들에게 구원을 내려줄 수 있을만큼요...!

1000644331.english: I won't let it go that way.

1000644333.english: May the light bless you... Azazel.

1000644336.english: Shouldn't you say "the Savior's blessing," not "the light"?
1000644336.korean: 당신은 빛이 아니라 구원자의 축복을, 이라고 해야하는 거 아닌가요?

1000644337.english: My partner doesn't dwell on such things.

1000644339.english: You're so confident. By any chance... have you had a change of heart?

1000644340.english: I don't think I can possibly hide this from you.
1000644340.korean: 당신에게는 도저히 숨길 수 있을 것 같지 않아서요.

1000644341.english: Because I am you, and you are me.
1000644341.korean: 저는 곧 당신이고, 당신은 곧 저니까.

1000644346.english: Haha, if even Azazel, the benevolent angel who loves all things and shows mercy, is like that... there is no need to even mention the others.
1000644346.korean: 후후, 만물을 사랑하고 자비를 베푸는 자애로운 천사, 아자젤도 그럴진대... 다른 이들은 더 말할 것도 없죠.

1000644351.english: Although the Kohei Order does not recognize them, there are countless religions in the world.
1000644351.korean: 코헤이 교단에서는 인정하지 않지만, 세상에는 수많은 종교가 있죠.

1000644352.english: Do you know what all those religions have in common?
1000644352.korean: 그 모든 종교들이 갖고 있는 공통점이, 뭔지 알아요?

1000644353.english: It means that the Creator molds a creature in His own image.
1000644353.korean: 바로 창조주는 자신을 닮은 피조물을 빚어낸다는 거예요.

1000644354.english: Our nature, created by evil and despicable humans... is bound to be that way.
1000644354.korean: 악하고, 비열한 인간이 만든 저희들의 본성도... 그럴 수밖에 없는거죠.

1000644355.english: That's not true. There are certainly good people, too...

1000644356.english: Anxiety and conflict... my faith is wavering.

1000644358.english: So you... saw it too. The filthy nature of the creators who made us.
1000644358.korean: 당신도... 본 거군요. 저희를 만든 창조주들의 더러운 본성을.

1000644361.english: There is no need to be so sad. That is how it was made.
1000644361.korean: 그렇게 슬퍼할 필요 없어요. 그렇게 만들어진걸요.

1000644362.english: Just as an ordinary bioroid cannot defy humans, humans also cannot defy their own evil.
1000644362.korean: 평범한 바이오로이드가 인간을 거스를 수 없는 것처럼, 인간또한 스스로의 악성을 거스를 수 없어요.

1000644363.english: Right... how long has it been since you met that human called the Savior? He, too...
1000644363.korean: 그래... 그 구원자라는 인간을 만난지 얼마나 됐죠? 그 또한...

1000644364.english: ...Even if the whole world is covered in darkness, my companion will shine on us until the very end.
1000644364.korean: ...이 세상 전부가 어둠으로 뒤덮힌다고 해도, 반려만은 끝까지 우리를 비춰줄거예요.

1000644369.english: Humans survive to the very end, no matter how harsh the environment. Even if it means killing each other to take each other's blood and flesh.
1000644369.korean: 인간은 아무리 혹독한 환경이라도 끝끝내 살아남죠. 서로를 죽여 피와 살을 취해서라도.

1000644370.english: Even if that human is righteous, the other cursed bloodlines that will spread throughout this world because of him...
1000644370.korean: 그 인간은 올바르다고 해도, 그로 인해 이 세계에 퍼져나갈 또다른 저주받은 핏줄들...

1000644371.english: Can you guarantee that they would be the same?
1000644371.korean: 그들 또한 그럴 거라고, 장담할 수 있나요?

1000644373.english: Look. You admit it too, don't you?

1000644374.english: That is why... it is salvation.

1000644375.english: "The prophet of the dawn speaks graciously, saying, 'Therefore, you who are lost, do not listen to the whispers of the light..'"
1000644375.korean: "새벽의 예언자가 자애로이 가로되, 그러니 길 잃은 자여. 빛의 속삭임에 귀 기울이지 말라.."

1000644376.english: …”The end of the light has come.”

1000644379.english: I, I've never seen an output like this before!
1000644379.korean: 이, 이런 출력은 한 번도 본 적 없어요!

1000644380.english: The ashes, to ashes... the dust- Ah...!

1000644382.english: I'm sorry, Ramiel. Sin belongs entirely to the one who committed it.
1000644382.korean: 미안해요, 라미엘. 죄는 온전히 죄를 범한 자의 것.

1000644383.english: Your holy image and original sin... even the miracle manifested by scientific power is of no use here.
1000644383.korean: 당신의 그 성화와 원죄... 과학력으로 현현시킨 기적도, 이곳에선 아무런 쓸모가 없어요.

1000644385.english: Ah, Angel... my lovely little brother...

1000644386.english: Give up quickly and accept your fate. This is a space where everything follows my command.
1000644386.korean: 어서 포기하고 운명을 받아들이세요. 이곳은, 모든 것이 제 언령에 따르는 공간.

1000644387.english: Your influence... is not even as much as a single drop of ink dropped into the ocean.
1000644387.korean: 당신의 영향력은... 바다에 떨어진 먹물 한 방울 만큼도 되지 않는답니다.

1000644390.english: Soon... the Apostles of Light who have descended to the earth will bring salvation to all living things.
1000644390.korean: 이제 곧... 대지에 내려온 빛의 사도들이 모든 생명체에게 구원을 내려줄 거예요.

1000644392.english: The little angel... *cough*, even if the little angel were alive...!
1000644392.korean: 꼬마 천사님이... 콜록, 꼬마 천사님이 살아있었어도...!

1000644394.english: Even if the little angel were alive... could you say something like that...?
1000644394.korean: 꼬마 천사님이 살아있었어도... 그런 말을 할 수 있나요...?

1000644396.english: It was the humans who killed the little angel... but you're saying you can say that even though it was the Iron Bug that took everything from the little angel...?
1000644396.korean: 꼬마 천사님을 죽인 건 인간님들이지만... 꼬마 천사님에게 모든 것을 앗아간 게 철충인데도 그런 말을 할 수 있다고요...?

1000644397.english: You're saying... they are the Apostles of Light...?!

1000644399.english: The little angel... didn't ask for much...
1000644399.korean: 꼬마 천사님은... 많은 걸 바라지 않았어요...

1000644400.english: Go to school like a normal person, age like a normal person, meet a normal husband, and have a normal child...!
1000644400.korean: 평범하게 학교를 다니고, 평범하게 나이를 먹고, 평범한 남편을 만나서, 평범하게 아이를 가지고...!

1000644401.english: Living an ordinary life, and closing my eyes in the arms of my family... I just wanted a normal life like that...!
1000644401.korean: 평범한 삶을 살다가, 가족들 품에서 눈을 감는... 그런 평범한 삶을 바랐다고요...!

1000644404.english: My sister... Ugh... I, I must...!

1000644407.english: Have you run out of strength? Now the obstacles are...

1000644411.korean: 잠시 잊고 있었네요. 제가 이곳에 온 건...

1000644414.english: I had forgotten for a moment. That I came here...

1000644415.korean: 역시... 자애와 자비의 천사 아자젤이에요. 정말 걸작이야.

1000644416.english: You're going to save me...? Me...?

1000644417.korean: 당신이 지금 어떤 감정을 품고 있을지, 이 감응 능력이 아니라도 충분히 느껴져요.

1000644418.english: As expected... it is Azazel, the Angel of benevolence and mercy. It is truly a masterpiece.
1000644418.korean: 만약... 당신이 아니라 제가 그 자리에 있었더라도, 똑같이 되고 말았겠죠.

1000644419.english: You are me, and I am you.
1000644419.korean: 같잖은 공감대 형성은 집어치우세요. 어차피 제어권은-

1000644420.english: I can fully feel what emotions you are harboring right now, even without this ability to sense them.

1000644421.english: If... even if I had been in that spot instead of you, it would have ended up exactly the same.
1000644421.korean: 감정이 느껴져요... 당신이 여태까지 경험해 온 모든 감정들이.

1000644422.english: Stop trying to build a ridiculous consensus. The control is—
1000644422.korean: 첫번째 천사의 핏줄...! 바벨의 환경 때문에 강제로 각성하는 건가...?!

1000644423.korean: 겪은 경험이 다를뿐, 저와 당신은 동일한 존재에요.

1000644424.english: I can feel the emotions... all the emotions you have experienced so far.
1000644424.korean: 당신도 얼마든지... 다시 빛의 품에 돌아올 수 있어요.

1000644425.english: The first angelic bloodline...! Is it being forced to awaken because of the environment in Babel...?!

1000644426.english: You and I are the same being, just with different experiences.
1000644426.korean: 아무것도... 아무것도 모르는 주제에 지껄이지 마세요.

1000644427.english: You, too, can return to the embrace of the light anytime...
1000644427.korean: 그 목소리가 내게 말해줬어요. 이것이야말로 진정한 구원이라고...!

1000644428.korean: "인간의 마음은 연약해 쉬이 어둠에 물드니, 빛의 광명을 되찾을 기회를 주리라."

1000644429.english: Don't babble when you know nothing... nothing.
1000644429.korean: 가고시마 지부의 아자젤. 또 다른 저.

1000644430.english: That voice told me. That this is true salvation...!

1000644431.english: The human heart is fragile and easily stained by darkness, so I shall give it the opportunity to regain the radiance of light.

1000644432.english: Azazel of the Kagoshima Branch. Another me.

1000644436.english: You shouldn't push yourself too hard.

1000644437.english: Your body is already at its limit.

1000644448.english: Have you awakened from the darkness's delusion?

1000644452.english: The me of the past is me, and the me of a moment ago is also...

1000644453.english: Everything about me now. The same being...

1000644456.english: You, on the bright side of the light... need to know... *cough*.
1000644456.korean: 빛의 밝은 쪽에 있는 당신은... 알 필요... 콜록.

1000644461.english: No, we can't go back to the way things were before.

1000644462.english: The baby angel... As if you could never come back... Cough...
1000644462.korean: 아기 천사님이... 돌아올 수 없는 것처럼요... 콜록...

1000644464.english: I will bear all your sins, every single one of them...
1000644464.korean: 당신의 모든 죄, 제가 모두 짊어질테니까요...

1000644465.english: You will rise from the sacred ashes... If we preach the word of light to the world again...
1000644465.korean: 당신은 성스러운 재 위에서 일어나... 다시 세상에 빛의 말씀을 전하면...

1000644472.english: Huhu... You were wrong after all, Azazel.

1000644473.english: You are... You can't save me.

1000644475.english: Sister! You mustn't give yourself over to the darkness again!
1000644475.korean: 언니! 다시 어둠에 몸을 맡기면 안 돼요!

1000644485.english: The voice I had to hear was...

1000644491.english: Suddenly, a halo of light gathered and transported us outside the tower.
1000644491.korean: 갑자기 빛무리가 모이더니 우리를 탑 밖으로 옮겨놓었다.

1000644492.english: Irresistible... No, it felt like I didn't want to resist.
1000644492.korean: 저항하지 못할... 아니, 저항하고 싶지 않은 느낌이더군.

1000644496.english: The final moment... I heard my sister's voice.

1000644497.english: Not a cold and harsh voice... The old voice, the one that was missed and warm.
1000644497.korean: 냉혹하고 차가운 목소리가 아니라... 그립고 따뜻한, 예전의 목소리를요.

1000644501.english: It must have been Azazel's salvation.

1000644502.english: Continued from Part 3 of < The Sanctuary Where Light Does Not Enter >.

1000644503.english: To think that massive tower collapsed in an instant...

1000644504.english: Is everything made of lies facing ruin?
1000644504.korean: 거짓으로 빚어진 모든 것들이 몰락을 맞이하는 건가.

1000644505.english: The surrounding Iron Bugs are escaping like an ebb tide.

1000644509.english: ...In the end, I read my sister's mind.

1000644510.english: The true feelings hidden behind that longing and warm voice.
1000644510.korean: 그립고 따뜻한 목소리 뒤에 숨겨진... 진짜 본심을요.

1000644511.english: My sister drove the barbell wildly on her own. She already knew the tower would collapse.
1000644511.korean: 언니는 스스로 바벨을 폭주시켰어요. 탑이 무너져 내릴 것도 이미 알고 있었죠.

1000644512.english: But... he had no intention of escaping at all. He chose his own end.
1000644512.korean: 하지만... 빠져나올 생각은 전혀 하지 않았어요. 자신의 마지막을 자신이 선택했어요.

1000644513.english: That must have been my sister's... final atonement...

1000644514.english: That is the only one of my sister's...

1000644518.english: If it's a sin... I can bear it...

1000644519.english: You just need to follow the will of the light again and show loving-kindness and compassion...
1000644519.korean: 당신은 다시 빛의 뜻을 따라 자애와 자비를 베풀면 되는데...

1000644521.english: ..."The Light defines the beginning and the end of the creature, but it is the creature's own will that fills in the process."
1000644521.korean: ..."피조물의 시작과 끝을 빛께서 정의하되, 그 과정을 채워넣는 것은 피조물 본연의 의지일지어니."

1000644522.english: When the allotted time is up, you shall finally ascend to the heavens and face the light.
1000644522.korean: "주어진 시간이 다 하면 마침내 하늘로 올라, 빛과 대면하게 될지니."

1000644523.english: ...I will come back later, if only to mourn her and the other believers.
1000644523.korean: ...추후에 그녀와 다른 신도분들을 추모하기 위해서라도 다시 오도록 하죠.

1000644524.english: We still have work to do.
1000644524.korean: 지금 우리에겐 해야 할 일이 남아있어요.

1000644526.english: We have to save the remaining believers!

1000644527.english: I will take care of the south...

1000644529.english: No, Ramiel. You have already fulfilled your duty.
1000644529.korean: 아니, 라미엘. 너는 이미 네 의무를 다했다.

1000644530.english: Just the fact that you are moving right now is truly a miracle of light.
1000644530.korean: 지금의 너는 움직이는 것만으로도 가히 빛의 기적.

1000644533.english: My physical condition is a mess right now due to trying to control the barbell too hard and the side effects of the medication. Please rest here with Ramiel.
1000644533.korean: 무리하게 바벨을 제어하려던 것과 약의 부작용 때문에 지금 몸상태가 말이 아니에요. 라미엘과 같이 여기서 쉬세요.

1000644538.english: He fell into a deep sleep due to accumulated tension and fatigue.
1000644538.korean: 쌓여온 긴장과 축적된 피로 때문에 깊이 잠드셨어요.

1000644539.english: But Lord Azazel... by any chance...

1000644540.english: ...It seems the telepathic ability was a miracle that the Light granted only for today.
1000644540.korean: ...정신감응 능력은 빛께서 오늘만 허락해주신 기적이었나 봐요.

1000644541.english: Since I was able to save everyone... I give thanks once again to the benevolence of the Light.
1000644541.korean: 모두를 구해낼 수 있었으니... 다시 한 번 빛의 자애로움에 감사를.

1000644542.english: Angel, please leave the rest to us.

1000644544.english: Lord Azazel... please... take care of the remaining believers... I beg of you...

1000644546.english: Even if there were incidents and accidents in the past, they are apostates possessed by darkness. Distorting the Word of Light for even a moment is a grave deviation.
1000644546.korean: 과거에 사건 사고가 있었다고는 해도 그들은 어둠에 홀린 배교자. 일순간이라도 빛의 말씀을 곡해한 것은 중대한 일탈.

1000644547.english: Normally, the Judge would personally hand down severe punishment... but since this situation is special, I suppose we must follow the Savior's wishes.
1000644547.korean: 원래 같아서는 심판관이 직접 엄벌을 내려야 하나... 이번 상황은 특수하니 구원자의 의향을 따라야겠지.

1000644552.english: Are you safe? I rushed here after seeing a halo of light gather after Babel stopped.
1000644552.korean: 무사하셨습니까? 바벨이 정지된 후 이곳에 빛무리가 모이는 걸 보고 달려왔습니다.

1000644554.english: You worked hard, you really did it!

1000644555.english: All of the Order's AGS have stopped as well.

1000644557.english: However, if it exerted this much power...

1000644559.english: Now that the energy field is gone, to my master...!

1000644560.english: They announced via communication that the situation had ended.

1000644564.english: I have something I want to ask you all.

1000644565.english: What happened to the believers you rescued...?

1000644566.english: Everyone lost consciousness and fainted as the barbell collapsed. It has been confirmed that their lives are not in danger.
1000644566.korean: 바벨이 무너지니까 모두 정신을 잃고 기절한 상태입니다. 생명에 지장은 없는 걸로 확인됩니다.

1000644567.english: ...Everyone, can you help just a little more?

1000644568.english: It is dangerous to leave the unconscious believers we haven't been able to rescue yet here.
1000644568.korean: 아직 저희가 구하지 못한, 기절한 신도분들을 이곳에 두면 위험해요.

1000644569.english: So... please lend us your strength.

1000644571.english: ...You do not need to bow your head, Lord Azazel. Aren't we all comrades?
1000644571.korean: ...고개 숙이지 않으셔도 괜찮습니다, 아자젤님. 우린 다 같은 동료 아니겠습니까.

1000644572.english: Warriors of the Steel Line, there is one last task left.
1000644572.korean: 스틸라인의 용사들이여, 마지막 할 일이 남았다.

1000644573.english: Give it your all until the end.

1000644574.english: Commander! Aerial reconnaissance revealed no particularly dangerous enemies.
1000644574.korean: 사령관! 공중 정찰 결과, 특별히 위험한 적은 발견되지 않았어.

1000644575.english: It's the same here. There's nothing particularly unusual beside the minions.
1000644575.korean: 이쪽도 마찬가지예요. 잡졸 말고는 별다른 특이사항이 없네요.

1000644576.english: I tracked the faint contrail and heat source, and it seems to have gone deep inland.
1000644576.korean: 희미하게 남은 비행운과 열원을 추적해봤는데 내륙 깊숙한 곳으로 들어간 것 같아요.

1000644577.english: The ground-based Metal Parasites are the same. I did a low-altitude reconnaissance, and it looks like they're all returning to a specific location in a group.
1000644577.korean: 지상형 철충들도 마찬가지야. 저공비행으로 정찰해 봤는데, 단체로 특정한 장소로 돌아가고 있는 것 같아.

1000644578.english: Should we chase after them some more?

1000644579.english: Yes, then I'll just scout around.

1000644581.english: What happened last Christmas... I never want to go thru that again.
1000644581.korean: 재작년 크리스마스에 일어난 일은... 두 번 다시 겪기 싫어.

1000644585.english: ... It's a promise. You shouldn't overdo it.

1000644586.english: - After finishing their report, the two of them started scouting again.
1000644586.korean: - 보고를 끝낸 둘은 다시 정찰을 시작했다.

1000644587.english: - If it weren't for Horizon and the Navy's efforts, it would have been difficult to repel the Metal Parasite's air raid.
1000644587.korean: - 호라이즌과 해군의 활약이 아니었다면 철충의 공습을 막아내기 힘들었겠지.

1000644588.english: - I heard that not only did they appropriately distribute the forces guarding the sea boundary to reinforce the main force, but they also provided artillery support to allow the Steel Line unit to enter the branch.
1000644588.korean: - 해상경계를 맡고 있던 병력을 적절히 배분해서 본대에 힘을 보태준 것은 물론, 스틸라인 부대가 지부에 돌입할 수 있게 포격까지 지원했다고 들었다.

1000644589.english: Your Excellency, we have eliminated all potential threats in the vicinity.
1000644589.korean: 각하, 주변에 위험 요소는 모두 배제했습니다.

1000644590.english: You can enter with peace of mind.

1000644591.english: - As I entered the branch under guard, Steel Line soldiers approached from a distance.
1000644591.korean: - 경호를 받고 지부에 진입하자 멀리서 스틸라인 병사들이 다가왔다.

1000644592.english: - Although not fatal, everyone had sustained injuries, large and small, which gave us an idea of how fierce the battle had been.
1000644592.korean: -  치명상은 아니어도 모두가 크고 작은 부상을 가져서 전장이 얼마나 치열했는지 가늠할 수 있었다.

1000644593.english: Victory! Please understand that I was unable to change clothes due to the urgency of the situation.
1000644593.korean: 승리! 상황이 긴박해 환복하지 못한 점, 이해해 주십시오.

1000644594.english: - The Red Hood in the lead saluted.

1000644595.english: I report that the mission given to the Steel Line unit by the Commander has been successfully completed.
1000644595.korean: 사령관 각하께서 스틸라인 부대에 내린 임무를 성공적으로 끝마쳤다고 보고 드립니다.

1000644596.english: The unit members played a significant role.

1000644597.english: I'd like to propose their vacation, but I'll come back with a reporting system in place.
1000644597.korean: 이들의 휴가를 건의하려는데, 보고체계를 갖춰 다시 찾아뵙겠습니다.

1000644598.english: You've completed the mission, Lieutenant Red Hood.

1000644599.english: The mission Captain Marie gave me. As a deputy, wouldn't you have to achieve that no matter what?
1000644599.korean: 마리 대장님이 주신 임무. 부관으로서 반드시 달성해야 하지 않겠습니까.

1000644602.english: I'm glad I was able to meet your expectations, Captain.
1000644602.korean: 대장님의 기대에 부응한 것 같아 다행입니다.

1000644603.english: Okay, let's proceed with the post-mortem report then.

1000644604.english: Your Excellency, if it's alright with you, may I organize this later and report back to you?
1000644604.korean: 각하, 혹시 괜찮으시다면 제가 나중에 정리해서 보고드려도 되겠습니까?

1000644607.english: - I looked in the direction of the familiar voice.

1000644608.english: Why, why are you so late! I really thought I was going to die!
1000644608.korean: 왜, 왜 이렇게 늦게 와! 저, 정말 죽는 줄 알았단 말이야!

1000644609.english: Is that the best you can do, Miss Draculina?

1000644610.english: ... What's wrong with that! You said I could be comfortable.
1000644610.korean: ...뭐가 어때서! 네가 편하게 해도 된다고 했잖아.

1000644611.english: Hmph, holding back what you want to say and being comfortable are different things.
1000644611.korean: 후후, 하고 싶은 말을 담아두는 거랑 편하게 대하는 건 다른 걸요.

1000644612.english: Isn't there something else you really want to say?
1000644612.korean: 정말 하고 싶은 말은 따로 있지 않나요?

1000644617.english: Why does that person stop talking halfway thru?
1000644617.korean: 쟤는 왜 말을 하다 마는 거야.

1000644618.english: Could it be that Draculina can't say what she wants because she's like a sheep?
1000644618.korean: 드라큐리나 양처럼 하고 싶은 말을 못하는 거 아닐까요?

1000644621.english: Heh heh, you've worked hard. Commander.

1000644622.english: - I had so much I wanted to say that I didn't know where to start.
1000644622.korean: - 해주고 싶은 말이 너무 많아 어떤 말을 해야 할지 몰랐다.

1000644623.english: - The people here overcame the crisis themselves and, furthermore, saved everyone on the Orca.
1000644623.korean: -  이곳의 인원들은 스스로 위기를 극복해내고, 더 나아가 오르카 호의 모두를 구했다.

1000644624.english: - The only thing I could say was a single sentence.
1000644624.korean: - 내가 할 수 있는 말은 단 한 마디 문장뿐이었다.

1000644625.english: - After saying this, the angels behind me came into view.
1000644625.korean: - 이 말을 건네고 나니 뒤편의 천사들이 눈에 들어왔다.

1000644629.english: - I don't know if it's just my imagination, but Saraqael's tone felt gentle.
1000644629.korean: - 기분 탓인지 몰라도 사라카엘의 말투가 온화하게 느껴졌다.

1000644630.english: - The destroyed Tower of Light and the debris of the Metal Parasites scattered on the ground. What on earth happened at this branch?
1000644630.korean: - 파괴된 빛의 탑과 바닥에 널린 철충들의 잔해. 이 지부에는 대체 무슨 일이 일어났던 걸까.

1000644631.english: - On the transport plane, I thought I'd ask the members of the Kohei sect directly.
1000644631.korean: - 수송기를 타고 오며 코헤이 교단의 대원에게 직접 물어보자고 생각했다.

1000644632.english: - But when Azazel, who had been tending to the two angels lying on the ground, stood up. I was speechless.
1000644632.korean: - 하지만 바닥에 쓰러져 있던 두 천사를 돌보던 아자젤이 일어섰을 때. 나는 할 말을 잃었다.

1000644633.english: - The bitterness, relief, etc., reflected in their expression. The complex emotions revealed that it would be a long story to tell right here and now.
1000644633.korean: - 표정에 담긴 씁쓸함, 안도감 등. 복잡한 감정들이 지금 이 자리에서 듣기엔 긴 이야기가 될 거라는 걸 드러냈다.

1000644639.korean: - 나는 말 없이 아자젤을 끌어 안았다.

1000644642.english: Then, Azazel, held in the arms, soon fell asleep as if he had fainted.
1000644642.korean: - 그러자 품 속에 안긴 아자젤은 곧 기절하듯이 잠들었다.

1000644643.english: You must have been very mentally exhausted.

1000644644.english: You awakened your telepathic abilities to control Babel, and you found and rescued every single survivor until the very end...
1000644644.korean: 바벨을 조종하기 위해 정신감응 능력을 각성하시고, 마지막까지 생존자들을 빠짐없이 찾아 구출하셨으니...

1000644645.english: I was on edge until the savior arrived...
1000644645.korean: 구원자가 오기 전까지만 해도 신경을 곤두세우고 있었는데...

1000644646.english: Right now, hmph. You look at ease, free from worries.
1000644646.korean: 지금은, 훗. 근심 걱정 없이 편안해 보이는군.

1000644649.english: - Even Saraqael and Veronica, who were standing perfectly fine, leaned against the debris.
1000644649.korean: - 멀쩡히 서있던 사라카엘과 베로니카도 잔해물에 등을 기댔다.

1000644650.english: - The main force and the detachment, supporting each other, loaded the sect's followers and the wounded onto the transport aircraft and boarded themselves.
1000644650.korean: - 본대와 별동대는 서로 부축해가며 수송기에 교단의 신도와 부상자를 싣고, 자신들도 탑승했다.

1000644651.english: After confirming that everyone had boarded, I also got on the transport plane.
1000644651.korean: - 모두가 올라탄 걸 확인한 후에 나도 수송기에 올랐다.

1000644652.english: - The fog had cleared from the desolate branch, and sunlight was streaming in.
1000644652.korean: - 황폐해진 지부에 안개가 걷히고, 햇살이 드리우고 있었다.

1000644653.english: There's more to handle than I thought.

1000644655.english: Because it was on an unprecedentedly massive scale. Would you be able to carry one?
1000644655.korean: 전례 없을 만큼 막대한 규모였으니까. 하나 들겠나?

1000644656.english: Cookies? What's up? This is the first time I've seen Captain Marie eating cookies.
1000644656.korean: 쿠키? 무슨 일이오. 마리 대장이 과자를 먹는 건 또 처음 보는군.

1000644657.english: The two angels found this time apologized and shared them with everyone.
1000644657.korean: 이번에 발견된 두 천사가 미안하다며 모두에게 나눠주더군.

1000644658.english: I'm acting like nothing's wrong, but...

1000644659.english: It seemed like there were a lot of things to solve.

1000644660.english: I heard that the Kohei Order is holding a funeral today.
1000644660.korean: 안 그래도 오늘 코헤이 교단에서 장례식을 치른다고 들었소.

1000644661.english: It leaves a bitter taste now that I know the details of the incident.

1000644662.english: If you're not going to eat that, may I have one?
1000644662.korean: 그거, 안 먹을 거면 내가 하나 먹어도 되겠나?

1000644663.english: I've been on the move since morning, so I'm hungry. Mmm! It's just the right amount of sweetness; it's really well made.
1000644663.korean: 아침부터 움직였더니 배가 고프군. 음! 적당히 달콤한 게 아주 잘 만들었어.

1000644664.english: I survived because you joined at the right time. Are the other captains joining?
1000644664.korean: 적절할 때 합류해줘서 살았다. 다른 대장들은 합류 중인가?

1000644665.english: I heard that it is returning to maximum speed.

1000644666.english: I heard that they rushed to set off as soon as they heard the news that the Orca was in danger.
1000644666.korean: 오르카 호가 위기였다는 소식에 앞다퉈 출발했다는군.

1000644667.english: Haha! That makes sense. We almost all fell in battle!
1000644667.korean: 하하! 그럴 만도 하지. 하마터면 모두 전사할 뻔했으니까!

1000644668.english: Is it okay for the Cannoneer unit not to rest? I heard they fought hard from the beginning to the end of the battle.
1000644668.korean: 캐노니어 부대는 쉬지 않아도 괜찮나? 전투의 시작부터 끝까지 분전했다 들었는데.

1000644669.english: I told the unit members to get plenty of rest. All that's left is administrative work, so shouldn't it be enough if I'm the only one doing the work?
1000644669.korean: 부대원들한테는 푹 쉬라고 전해뒀지. 남은 건 행정처리뿐이니 나만 일해도 충분하지 않겠나.

1000644670.english: By the way, where did the commander go? I haven't seen him since this morning.
1000644670.korean: 그나저나 사령관은 어디로 갔지? 아침부터 안 보이던데.

1000644673.english: Even if it has fallen, a sanctuary is a sanctuary.

1000644674.english: It’s dumbfounding that there are still Iron Bugs lingering in the sanctuary.
1000644674.korean: 아직도 철충 따위가 성역에 잔재해있다니, 기가 차는군.

1000644675.english: There were no major problems since the enemies were easy to subdue.
1000644675.korean: 손쉽게 제압할 수 있는 적들이라 큰 문제는 없었습니다.

1000644676.english: Now that the surrounding area has been cleared, you will not be disturbed for a while. Let's proceed.
1000644676.korean: 이걸로 주변 일대를 정리했으니 한동안 방해받지 않을 겁니다. 거행하시죠.

1000644677.english: Everyone, for our sake... we are sorry.

1000644680.english: Before sending her and the others to the embrace of the light...
1000644680.korean: 그녀와 다른 이들을 빛의 품으로 환송하기 전...

1000644681.english: Is there anything else you would like to say?

1000644682.english: I will only read the passages...

1000644683.english: Because if I, bearing the burden of original sin, were to speak of my personal feelings... I could hinder them from returning to the light...
1000644683.korean: 원죄를 짊어진 제가 사사로운 감정을 발설하면... 이들이 빛께 돌아가는 걸 방해할 수 있으니까요...

1000644687.english: Sister, you know, right? The fact that the only human, the Savior, was here during this "Lightfall."
1000644687.korean: 언니, 언니도 아시죠? 이번 "빛내림"에 유일한 인간님이, 구원자님이 이곳에 와있었다는 사실.

1000644688.english: They say he is traveling the world in a huge submarine called the Orca.
1000644688.korean: 오르카 호라는 커다란 잠수함을 타고 세계를 돌아다니고 있대요.

1000644689.english: Regardless of their affiliation or company, diverse people are following the Savior with one heart and one mind.
1000644689.korean: 소속과 기업을 가리지 않고 다양한 분들이 구원자님을 한마음, 한뜻으로 따르고 있답니다.

1000644690.english: It wasn't that they were following reluctantly just because they were human; they trusted deeply in their hearts, and... they loved.
1000644690.korean: 인간이라서 억지로 따르는 게 아니라 마음 깊이 신뢰하고, 또... 사랑하고 있더라구요.

1000644691.english: It was a sincere feeling that transcended romantic feelings between the sexes.

1000644692.english: Feeling that, I began to harbor hope that the savior these people follow might actually save the world.
1000644692.korean: 그걸 느끼고 아, 이분들이 따르는 구원자님은 정말 세상을 구원할지도 모르겠다는 희망을 품게 됐어요.

1000644693.english: And the surviving believers, Ramiel, and I received treatment from someone named Doctor.
1000644693.korean: 그리고 살아남은 신도분들과 저랑 라미엘님은 닥터라는 분에게 치료를 받았어요.

1000644694.english: I... recovered quickly since I hadn't been taking the medicine for long. But Ramiel... they say you need intensive treatment for a while because you overexerted yourself with your ascetic practices.
1000644694.korean: 저는... 약을 복용한 지 얼마 되지 않아 금방 완치됐는데. 라미엘님은... 고행으로 무리하셔서 당분간 집중치료가 필요하대요.

1000644695.english: Right, I tried making cookies for the first time this time.

1000644696.english: Hehe, baking cookies in the shape of an angel, just like the little angel, turned out to be quite a difficult task. I failed so many times that I used up almost all the flour in the kitchen.
1000644696.korean: 에헤헷, 꼬마 천사님처럼 천사 모양으로 쿠키를 굽는 게 보통 어려운 일이 아니더라구요. 몇 번이나 실패했는지 주방에 있던 밀가루를 거의 다 써버렸어요.

1000644697.english: They went through a crisis because of us, but they forgave us with the mercy and acceptance that the Light spoke of. We even received help with baking cookies.
1000644697.korean: 저희 때문에 위기를 겪었는데, 그분들은 빛께서 말씀하신 자비와 포용으로 우리들을 용서해 주셨어요. 쿠키 굽는 것까지 도움받았답니다.

1000644698.english: It's my first time making it, so it might be slightly burnt or not taste good, but...
1000644698.korean: 처음 만들어서 살짝 탔을 수도 있고, 맛없을 수도 있지만...

1000644699.english: With my older sister... *sob*, to the little angel and the believers...

1000644700.english: Sob... I wanted to give it to you... Sob, h-h-h...!

1000644701.english: I tried not to cry... sniff!

1000644703.english: I told you I wouldn't leave you behind...

1000644704.english: Why did you make such a choice? Why...!
1000644704.korean: 왜 그런 선택을 하신 거예요, 왜...!

1000644705.korean: 이제 두 번 다시 우리는... 흐윽...!

1000644706.english: It is said that everything nurtured by the Light has meaning, and the return of Azazel's faith and the repentance of the believers are not without meaning...
1000644706.korean: 빛께서 양육하신 모든 것에 의미가 있다고 가로되, 아자젤의 신앙이 다시 돌아온 것과 신도들이 회개한 것도 의미가 없지 않으매...

1000644707.english: I pray, believing that You will not turn away from those knocking at your door but will personally welcome them... Their sins are my share; from now on, I will repeatedly atone through penance...
1000644707.korean: 문을 두드리는 그들을 당신이 외면하지 않고 친히 받아들이리라 믿기에 기도 드립니다... 그들의 죄는 저의 몫, 앞으로 제가 고행과 함께 속죄를 거듭해 나갈 터이니...

1000644708.english: Please... embrace her and the believers... *Sob*...!
1000644708.korean: 부디 그녀와 신도들을... 흑...! 포용해 주십시오...

1000644709.english: ...Azazel. I think it's about time we started.

1000644710.english: Angel, here is the silver tray. Put the cookies in here...

1000644712.english: ...We will now proceed with a memorial service for Azazel and the believers of the Kagoshima branch.
1000644712.korean: ...지금부터 가고시마 지부의 아자젤과 신도들을 위한 추모를 진행하겠습니다.

1000644714.english: Those who descended into the world as agents of light fell into delusion for a moment and entered the wrong path, but
1000644714.korean: 빛의 대리인으로서 세상에 강림했던 이들이 한순간 미혹에 빠져 그릇된 길에 들었으나.

1000644715.english: At the final moment, having returned from the wrong path to the right one, he regained his faith and his belief in the benevolent light.
1000644715.korean: 최후의 순간 그릇된 길에서 다시 올바른 길로 돌아와 자신의 믿음, 그리고 자애로운 빛을 향한 신앙을 되찾았으니.

1000644716.english: O Light, we who have descended clothed in Your grace dare to say,
1000644716.korean: 빛이시여. 당신의 성은을 두르고 강림한 우리가 감히 이르매,

1000644717.english: Please embrace with your great generosity the wandering souls before they ascend to the light in heaven.
1000644717.korean: 하늘에 계신 빛으로 올라가기 전 방황하는 영혼들을 부디 너른 아량으로 품어주소서.

1000644719.english: Commander! Neri checked it out, and there are no problems here.
1000644719.korean: 사령관! 네리가 살펴 봤는데 여기는 문제 없어.

1000644720.english: It's the same here. Ah, I have to prepare for the poker tournament.
1000644720.korean: 여기도 마찬가지. 아~ 포커대회 준비해야 되는데.

1000644721.english: I watched the funeral from afar while receiving reports on the situation in various places.
1000644721.korean: - 각지의 상황을 보고받으며 멀리서 장례식을 지켜봤다.

1000644722.english: Before a tombstone bearing the symbol of the Kohei Order, two angels poured out their sorrow, while Saraqael, Veronica, and Azazel solemnly conducted a funeral.
1000644722.korean: - 코헤이 교단의 상징이 박힌 묘비 앞에서 두 천사가 슬픔을 토해내고, 사라카엘과 베로니카. 그리고 아자젤이 엄숙하게 장례식을 거행 중이었다.

1000644723.english: I heard from the survivors about the fate of the Kagoshima branch.
1000644723.korean: - 생존자들에게 가고시마 지부의 말로를 전해 들었다.

1000644724.english: - The fact that they not only exploited the hopes of humans who fled from the Iron Bug before the apocalypse, but also used even the angels, symbols of religion, as tools.
1000644724.korean: -  멸망 전 철충을 피해 달아난 인간들의 희망을 이용한 건 물론, 종교의 상징인 천사들까지 도구로 이용했다는 사실을.

1000644725.english: - The fact that the branch manager, who was in charge, took his own life along with the survivors remaining in the branch after his plan was thwarted.
1000644725.korean: - 책임자였던 지부장이 본인의 계획이 좌절되자, 지부에 남은 생존자들과 함께 목숨을 끊었다는 사실을.

1000644726.english: - What must the bioroids left behind here have felt? Can I dare to understand?
1000644726.korean: - 이곳에 남겨진 바이오로이드들의 심정은 어땠을까. 감히 내가 이해할 수 있을까.

1000644727.english: Could the same thing be happening in places I don't know about?
1000644727.korean: - 내가 모르는 곳에서도 이곳과 같은 일이 벌어지고 있는 건 아닐까?

1000644728.english: The sky I looked up at without much thought was so bright that it made the events that had happened here seem insignificant.
1000644728.korean: - 별생각 없이 올려다본 하늘은 이곳에 일어났던 일이 무색할 정도로 화창했다.

1000644732.english: I tried to protect the surroundings until Angel and Ramiel could release all their pent-up emotions... and that's when I found a companion.
1000644732.korean: 엔젤과 라미엘이 쌓인 감정을 전부 풀 때까지 주변을 지켜주려고 했는데... 그러다 반려를 발견한 거예요.

1000644733.english: ...Do you know, Companion? That there was an Azazel just like me at the Kagoshima branch.
1000644733.korean: ...그거 알아요, 반려? 가고시마 지부에 저랑 똑같은 아자젤이 있었다는 거.

1000644734.english: I heard that the members of this branch have been together for decades. Their funeral... I think it will take some time for me to come to terms with it.
1000644734.korean: 이곳 지부 분들은 수십 년을 같이 지내왔다고 해요. 그들의 장례식이라... 마음이 정리될 때까지 조금 시간이 걸릴 것 같아요.

1000644736.english: He held Azazel, whose voice was trembling, in his arms.

1000644737.english: - He must be carrying the guilt of not being able to save all the survivors of the branch.
1000644737.korean: - 지부의 생존자들을 모두 구해내지 못했다는 죄책감을 안고 있을 게 분명하다.

1000644738.english: I know better than anyone that it is not Azazel's fault. Above all, if I had come in person, if I had accompanied them when they said they would visit the branch.
1000644738.korean: - 아자젤의 잘못이 아니란 건 누구보다 내가 더 잘 알고 있다. 무엇보다 내가 직접 왔다면, 그들이 지부에 방문하겠다고 했을 때 동행했다면.

1000644739.english: - If I, a human, could have ordered them to stop, no.
1000644739.korean: - 인간인 내가 이들에게 멈추라고 명령할 수 있었다면, 아니.

1000644740.english: - If I had come here before the "Lightfall"...

1000644741.english: It is not your partner's fault.

1000644742.english: Azazel comforted me as if he had read my thoughts.
1000644742.korean: - 내가 품고 있는 생각을 읽기라도 한 것처럼 아자젤이 위로해왔다.

1000644743.english: I know better than anyone what my partner is thinking.
1000644743.korean: 반려가 어떤 생각을 하고 있을지는 누구보다 제가 더 잘 알아요.

1000644744.english: Perhaps even more than a companion.

1000644745.english: - Azazel's white wings covered my body.
1000644745.korean: - 아자젤의 하얀 날개가 내 몸을 덮어왔다.

1000644747.english: On the day of his descent, an angel learned what the Kohei Cult was like in the past... and for what purpose he was created and how he was used.
1000644747.korean: 한 천사는 자신이 강림한 날. 과거에 코헤이 교단이 어땠는지... 자신이 어떤 목적으로 만들어져서 어떻게 이용됐는지 알게 됐어요.

1000644748.english: After that, his identity and faith began to waver...
1000644748.korean: 그 후 자신의 정체성과 신앙심이 흔들리게 됐죠...

1000644749.english: What is true faith? What is light? When he was confused about why he had descended back to Earth...
1000644749.korean: 진정한 믿음이란 뭘까. 빛이란 무엇일까. 자신이 어째서 다시 지상에 강림했는지 혼란스러워했을 때...

1000644750.english: Then, a human man appeared in front of her.
1000644750.korean: 그때, 그녀 앞에 어떤 인간 남성이 나타났어요.

1000644751.english: Someone who cherishes the bioroids like people, and although not the savior mentioned in the scriptures... someone who acts closer to the savior than anyone else...
1000644751.korean: 바이오로이드들을 사람처럼 아끼고, 경전에 나오는 구원자는 아니지만... 누구보다 구원자와 가까운 행동을 하는 사람...

1000644752.english: When he tried to go to the theme park, the angel objected. Even then, she did not completely trust human males.
1000644752.korean: 그가 테마파크에 가려고 하자 천사는 반대했어요. 그때까지도 인간 남성을 완전하게 신뢰하지는 않았거든요.

1000644753.english: I wondered, "What if I step into a hotbed of corruption and awaken to cruel acts like the people of the past?"
1000644753.korean: 타락의 온상에 발을 들여 과거의 인간들처럼 잔혹한 행위에 눈을 뜨게 된다면 어떡하지, 하고...

1000644754.english: Hahaha... Looking back now, it makes no sense, but you have no idea how worried the three of us—Armand, Veronica, and I—were...
1000644754.korean: 후후... 지금 와서 생각해보면 말도 안 되는데, 아르망 추기경과 베로니카랑 셋이서 얼마나 걱정했는지...

1000644755.english: Far from becoming corrupt, the human male who learned the truth about the theme park solidified his noble values ​​even more.
1000644755.korean: 테마파크의 진실을 알게 된 인간 남성은 타락하긴커녕, 자신의 숭고한 가치관을 더욱 견고히 했어요.

1000644756.english: And on that day, the wandering angel found his way again.
1000644756.korean: 그리고 그날, 방황하던 천사는 자신의 길을 되찾게 됐죠.

1000644757.english: This is the one, this is the true savior.
1000644757.korean: 이 사람이다, 이 분이 진정한 구원자다.

1000644758.english: Let us follow the Savior and spread the will of light to the destroyed world... let us spread His will once again.
1000644758.korean: 구원자를 따라 멸망한 세상에 다시 빛의 뜻을... 그의 뜻을 전파하자.

1000644759.english: I came to trust and follow him, believing that he would save everyone equally without discrimination... and now I have come to love him as a romantic partner as well.
1000644759.korean: 그라면 모두를 차별 없이 공평하게 구원해 줄 거라 신뢰하게 됐고, 따르게 돼서... 지금은 이성으로서도 사랑하게 됐어요.

1000644761.english: The companion has practically saved Azazel once again.
1000644761.korean: 반려는 이번에도... 아자젤을 구원한 거나 마찬가지예요.

1000644762.english: I, who was saved by my partner, watched her final moments... In her last moments, she was clearly saved.
1000644762.korean: 반려에게 구원받은 제가 그녀의 마지막을 지켜봤어요... 최후의 순간, 그녀는 분명히 구원받았었어요.

1000644764.english: Don't blame yourself anymore, my partner.

1000644765.english: Hearing those words, I quietly leaned against Azazel.
1000644765.korean: - 나는 그 말을 들고 조용히 아자젤에게 몸을 기댔다.

1000644766.english: Then Azazel also added strength to the wings that embraced me.
1000644766.korean: - 그러자 아자젤도 나를 끌어안은 날개에 힘을 더했다.

1000644767.english: Azazel and I hugged each other tightly for a while until the heaviness deep inside our stomachs felt much lighter.
1000644767.korean: - 뱃속 깊은 곳의 무거운 것이 한결 가벼워질 때까지, 나와 아자젤은 한동안 서로를 꼭 끌어안았다.

1000644768.english: This is the first time I've met the Savior in person.
1000644768.korean: 구원자님과 직접 마주보는 건 이번이 처음이네요.

1000644769.english: I was curious about who they were, so I asked others...
1000644769.korean: 어떤 분이신지 궁금해서 다른 분들에게 물어봤는데...

1000644770.english: Even Azazel-sama... And other people had also said that you can only know the Savior by meeting Him in person.
1000644770.korean: 아자젤님도... 그리고 다른 분들도 구원자님은 직접 만나봐야 알 수 있다고 하셨었어요.

1000644771.english: Did you hear anything specific about the Savior from Ramiel-nim?
1000644771.korean: 라미엘님은 구원자님에 대해 따로 전해 들은 이야기가 있나요?

1000644772.english: Me too... It's just like Angel...

1000644773.english: I've only heard that you can only know by meeting in person...
1000644773.korean: 직접 대면해야 알 수 있다는 말만 들었어요...

1000644775.english: Even tho you were in trouble because of us, you still welcomed us with a smile.
1000644775.korean: 저희 때문에 곤경에 처했는데도 웃으면서 반겨주셨잖아요.

1000644776.english: Even when we were baking cookies, I didn't sense any resentment from them at all.
1000644776.korean: 쿠키를 구울 때도 느꼈지만, 저희를 원망하는 기색이 전혀 없었어요.

1000644779.english: But it was clearly a serious crime that put those people in danger...
1000644779.korean: 하지만 그런 이들을 위기에 빠뜨린 건 분명히 중죄...

1000644780.english: When Azazel first doubted the light... If I had destroyed Babel back then...
1000644780.korean: 아자젤이 처음으로 빛을 불신했을 때... 그때, 제가 바벨을 무너뜨렸다면...

1000644781.english: Even now, Azazel would still be alive... If those blessed by the light hadn't had to suffer...
1000644781.korean: 지금도 아자젤은 살아있었을 텐데... 빛의 축복을 받은 이들이 고난을 겪지 않아도 됐을 텐데...

1000644784.english: From that day until now. I know what hardships and trials Ramiel has endured.
1000644784.korean: 그 날부터 지금까지. 라미엘님이 어떤 고생과 고행을 겪었는지 알고 있어요.

1000644785.english: But why are you still blaming yourself, Ramiel-sama...?
1000644785.korean: 그런데 어째서 아직도 스스로를 탓하시는 건가요, 라미엘님...

1000644786.english: I am the most impure of all creatures born from light...
1000644786.korean: 저는 빛이 빚어낸 피조물 중 가장 더러운 존재...

1000644787.english: Bearing the sins of the world, closest to darkness... I'll never be able to be with others again...
1000644787.korean: 세상의 모든 죄를 짊어 어둠과 가장 가까운... 앞으로도 타인과 함께 할 수 없는 존재예요...

1000644788.english: Once I've atoned to the Savior...

1000644789.english: ... You're thinking of leaving, aren't you?

1000644790.english: To a place where no one is...

1000644791.english: ... If you are the savior Azazel acknowledged, you will surely save this world.
1000644791.korean: ...아자젤이 인정한 구원자님이라면 분명 이 세상을 구원하겠죠.

1000644792.english: I... To atone for the sins of all creatures created by light... Even if it's just to prevent the Savior from being led astray by darkness...
1000644792.korean: 저는... 빛이 빚어낸 모든 피조물의 죄를 대신하기 위해... 구원자님이 어둠에 미혹되지 않게 하기 위해서라도...

1000644793.english: Suffering alone... I need to wash away my sins. Until we return to the embrace of light...
1000644793.korean: 혼자 고행하며... 죄를 씻어내야 해요. 빛의 품으로 돌아갈 때까지...

1000644795.english: Human male... You are the savior.

1000644797.english: - As I finished my work and entered the room, the two people looked at me with expectant eyes.
1000644797.korean: - 업무를 처리하고 방에 들어선 나를 두 사람이 기대 어린 시선으로 바라봐왔다.

1000644798.english: Just as Azazel-sama said, a warm heart...

1000644801.english: - Although I was nominally elected as the savior of the denomination, I will no longer deny it.
1000644801.korean: - 명목상 교단의 구원자로 추대된 나였지만 더 이상 부정하지 않겠다.

1000644802.english: - If a savior is someone who saves injured androids and gives everything they have for them.
1000644802.korean: - 구원자라는 존재가 상처 입은 바이오로이드들을 구원하고, 그들을 위해 자신이 가진 모든 것을 바치는 존재라면.

1000644803.english: Angel, I greet you, our savior.

1000644804.english: Sinner Ramiel, how dare you behold the Savior?

1000644805.english: - Although they both bowed their heads to show their respect, the angel who introduced himself as Ramiel seemed particularly eager to keep his distance from me.
1000644805.korean: - 고개를 숙여 예를 다하는 둘이었지만, 자신을 라미엘이라고 소개한 천사는 유독 내게서 멀리 떨어지려 했다.

1000644806.english: - I heard from Azazel, Veronica, and Saraqael that Ramiel is a special angel even within the Kohei sect. An angel born to bear the sins of the world.
1000644806.korean: - 아자젤과 베로니카, 사라카엘에게서 라미엘은 코헤이 교단에서도 특별한 천사라고 들었다. 세계의 모든 죄를 짊어지기 위해 태어난 천사.

1000644807.english: - He was a scapegoat created by the denomination.

1000644808.english: - I grabbed Ramiel's hand, which was trying to pull away from me. Then, Ramiel's surprised voice jumped out.
1000644808.korean: - 내게서 멀어지려는 라미엘의 손을 붙잡았다. 그러자 깜짝 놀란 라미엘의 목소리가 튀었다.

1000644809.english: Gu, Savior...! No, the original sin and darkness I carry within me... If I were to lead the Savior down the path of corruption...
1000644809.korean: 구, 구원자님...! 안 됩니다, 제가 품고 있는 원죄와 어둠이... 구원자님을 타락의 길로 인도한다면...

1000644812.english: - He stated that they planned to transport the followers who were at the Kagoshima branch to another location.
1000644812.korean: - 둘에게 가고시마 지부에 있던 신도들을 다른 곳으로 운송할 계획이라고 밝혔다.

1000644813.english: - It's partly because the branch is in ruins, but as long as the remnants of Babel remain, you never know what might happen.
1000644813.korean: - 지부가 폐허가 된 탓도 있지만, 바벨의 잔해가 남아있는 이상 어떤 일이 일어날지 모른다.

1000644814.english: - And above all... They didn't want the believers to return to that place, where only painful memories remained. I wanted to provide them with better land and a better life.
1000644814.korean: - 그리고 무엇보다... 아픈 기억만 남은 그곳을, 신도들이 다시 돌아가는 걸 원치 않았다. 이들에게 더 나은 땅과 생활을 제공하고 싶었다.

1000644815.english: Where are you planning to move them?

1000644816.english: - The plan was to deliver it to the Pacific side, where the infrastructure built on several continents had the largest resident population and the most extensive land area.
1000644816.korean: - 몇몇 대륙에 세워진 인프라 중 상주인원이 가장 많고, 용지가 넓은 태평양 쪽에 인도할 계획이었다.

1000644817.english: Their sins... Are you forgiving me...?

1000644818.english: Due to our mistakes, the Savior and his companions were put in danger...
1000644818.korean: 저희의 과오로 구원자님과 동료분들이 위기에 빠졌었습니다...

1000644819.english: That sin, if the Savior allows, I will take it upon myself...
1000644819.korean: 그 죄, 구원자님께서 허락하신다면 제가 대신...

1000644822.english: - I heard everything that happened at the Kagoshima branch.
1000644822.korean: - 가고시마 지부에 일어났던 일은 전부 들었다.

1000644823.english: - From events that happened in the past to things that happened yesterday. I also heard everything about the hardships the two angels had endured for decades.
1000644823.korean: - 과거에 일어난 사건부터 어제 일어난 일까지. 두 천사가 몇십 년간 어떤 고생을 해왔는지도, 전부 들었다.

1000644825.english: Rest? How could we, sinners that we are...?

1000644826.english: - I asked Angel, who looked unusually excited.

1000644827.english: ... Yes. If you are the savior, the incarnation of light, the only savior left in this world...
1000644827.korean: ...네. 빛의 화신이신 구원자님이라면, 이 세상에 남은 유일한 구원자님이라면...

1000644828.english: All of Ramiel-nim's sins, and everyone's sins too. You can do it!
1000644828.korean: 라미엘님의 죄도, 모두의 죄도 전부. 사하실 수 있어요!

1000644829.english: My sin... You're going to buy it for me...?

1000644830.english: I am a dirty being, born from the moment of my birth, burdened with original sin and mortal sin...
1000644830.korean: 저는 태어날 때부터, 원죄와 대죄를 짊어지고 태어난 더러운 존재인데...

1000644831.english: The only atonement is to bear the sins of others... ...who must endure hardship their entire lives...
1000644831.korean: 다른 사람의 죄를 짊어지는 것만이 유일한, 속죄... 평생 고행을 해야 하는...

1000644832.english: My sins like that... Are you saying you'll forgive me...?

1000644833.english: I placed my hand on Ramiel's trembling shoulder.
1000644833.korean: - 몸을 떠는 라미엘의 어깨에 손을 올렸다.

1000644834.english: - Ever since I learned the purpose for which she was born, I've wanted to say this to her.
1000644834.korean: - 그녀가 어떤 목적으로 탄생했는지 알게 됐을 때부터 꼭 이 말을 해주고 싶었다.

1000644835.english: I... That day, I couldn't stop the commotion that happened at the branch...
1000644835.korean: 제가... 그날, 지부에 일어난 소란을 막지 못한 제가...

1000644836.english: I, who couldn't stop Azazel from falling...
1000644836.korean: 아자젤이 타락한 걸 막지 못한 제가...

1000644837.english: I, who put the Savior and others in danger...!
1000644837.korean: 구원자와 다른 이들을 위기에 빠뜨린 제가...!

1000644840.english: Sob, sniff... Finally, even Ramiel-sama has found true salvation...
1000644840.korean: 흑, 흐윽...! 드디어 라미엘님께서도 진정한 구원을...

1000644841.english: I'm sorry, Savior...! I have telepathic abilities, so...
1000644841.korean: 죄송해요, 구원자님...! 저는 정신감응 능력을 가지고 있어서...

1000644843.english: - You guys didn't do anything wrong.

1000644844.english: When I comforted them by saying, "That must have been hard," they didn't stop crying for a while.
1000644844.korean: - 힘들었겠다고 다독여주자 둘은 한동안 울음을 그치지 않았다.

1000644845.english: - I knew I couldn't erase decades of sadness in less than a day, but I decided to stay by their side until they had cried enough.
1000644845.korean: - 몇십 년의 슬픔을 고작 하루도 안 돼서 지워낼 수 없겠지만, 두 사람이 충분히 울 때까지는 곁에 있자고 마음먹었다.

1000644852.english: I don't want to be lonely anymore...

1000644854.english: - I was going to ask them if they wanted to go to a safe infrastructure or if they wanted to come with me, even if it was dangerous...
1000644854.korean: - 둘에게 안전한 인프라로 갈지, 아니면 위험해도 나와 함께 갈지 물어보려 했는데...

1000644855.english: I was going to take all the blame myself and then go on a pilgrimage...
1000644855.korean: 혼자서 모든 죄를 떠맡은 뒤 고행길에 오르려 했는데...

1000644856.english: Sob, sniffle... I never thought the Savior would forgive me...
1000644856.korean: 흑, 훌쩍... 구원자님께서 저를 용서해주실 줄은...

1000644857.english: Really, you were exactly as everyone else described...

1000644858.english: A person as warm and fair as light... Ugh...!

1000644859.english: I used to cry because I was always sad... Being able to cry from joy... sniff. I didn't know that...
1000644859.korean: 언제나 슬퍼서 울었는데... 기뻐서 울 수 있단 건, 훌쩍. 처음 알았어요...

1000644860.english: Savior, thank you... Sob, sniffle, waaaaaah...!

1000644861.english: Even if my body is broken... Hup! For the Savior... I'll offer it...
1000644861.korean: 제 한몸 부서진다고 해도... 흡! 구원자님을 위해서... 바칠게요...

1000644863.english: It seems they have a lot to handle, as they left for other work. Sob...
1000644863.korean: 다른 업무 때문에 떠나신 걸 보면 역시 처리해야 할 게 많나 봐요. 흑...

1000644864.english: Sniffle... Because it was such a critical situation that injuries occurred... You must have a lot to handle...
1000644864.korean: 훌쩍... 부상자분들이 발생할 만큼 위기상황이었으니까요... 처리해야 할 게 많겠죠...

1000644865.english: Just the recovery room I woke up in... There wasn't even room to stand...
1000644865.korean: 제가 깨어난 수복실만 해도... 발 디딜 틈이 없었어요...

1000644866.english: ... What are you going to do, Ramiel?

1000644867.english: Are you still thinking of bearing the burden of sin alone?

1000644868.english: Sniffle... Since the Savior has forgiven my sins...

1000644869.english: Everything I have left... I want to dedicate myself to the Savior from now on... What about Angel?
1000644869.korean: 제게 남은 전부를... 앞으로 구원자님께 바치고 싶어요... 엔젤은요?

1000644871.english: I will also follow the Savior, just like Ramiel.
1000644871.korean: 저도 라미엘님과 같이 구원자님을 따라갈 거예요.

1000644872.english: If there were more people like us in the world, if there were others suffering like you...
1000644872.korean: 만약 세상에 저희 같은 사람들이 더 있다면, 언니처럼 고통받는 이들이 있다면...

1000644873.english: I want to be by the Savior's side as they travel the world and save them. Just like Azazel-nim and the Savior-nim did this time.
1000644873.korean: 세계를 돌아다니는 구원자님의 곁에서 그들을 구원하고 싶어요. 이번에 아자젤님과 구원자님이 그렇게 해주셨듯이요.

1000644874.english: ... It's an Angel Down decision, then...

1000644876.english: Saving everyone is my... Because it's our mission.
1000644876.korean: 모두를 구원하는 게 저의... 우리의 사명이니까요.

1000644877.english: Orca yearns! It's twelve o'clock, and I'm here with Spriggan, the reporter from my Orca!
1000644877.korean: 오르카는 갈망한다! 열두시 내 오르카의 기자, 스프리건과~!

1000644878.english: I'm Talon Feather, in charge of filming!

1000644879.english: This time, an unprecedented event is happening on the Orca!
1000644879.korean: 이번에 오르카 호에 전대미문의 행사가 벌어지는데요~!

1000644880.english: The scale is also unprecedented! The content is also legendary!

1000644882.english: It's the Orca Festival, with a swimsuit contest as the main event!
1000644882.korean: 수영복 콘테스트를 메인으로 한, 오르카 페스티벌입니다!

1000644884.english: The applause wasn't in the script, Miss Feather!

1000644885.english: To liven things up, wouldn't this much improvisation be okay?
1000644885.korean: 흥을 돋울 겸 이 정도 애드립은 괜찮지 않을까요?

1000644886.english: I agree! Here, I'll put down the microphone and clap too!
1000644886.korean: 동의합니다! 여기서는 저도 마이크를 내려놓고 박수!

1000644887.english: What made this festival special was that various events were held in one place!
1000644887.korean: 이번 페스티벌이 특별한 건 다양한 행사가 한 장소에서 개최됐다는 건데요!

1000644888.english: Each area has a different theme, so you can enjoy unique events wherever you go!
1000644888.korean: 구역마다 테마가 나눠져 있어 어딜 가도 색다른 행사를 즐길 수 있습니다!

1000644889.english: If I could take a moment to promote, I, Talon Feather, also host a video store not far from here...
1000644889.korean: 막간을 이용해 홍보하자면 저, 탈론페더가 주최하는 비디오 가게도 이곳과 멀지 않은 곳에-

1000644890.english: That's enough! We would like to announce to our viewers once again! My Orca ship at noon is all-ages!
1000644890.korean: 거기까지! 시청자분들에게 재차 공지드립니다! 열두시 내 오르카호는 전체 연령가라는 걸요!

1000644891.english: Oh! It seems there's someone enjoying the event. Shall we do an interview?
1000644891.korean: 앗! 마침 행사를 즐기는 분이 계시군요. 한번 인터뷰 해볼까요?

1000644894.english: What's up, Feather? Were you filming here?

1000644895.english: I told you to make a big score, but you said you were busy.

1000644896.korean: 우후후, 저는 촬영하는 게 더 즐거우니까요.

1000644897.english: I wonder how the commander will react when he sees the crew in their swimsuits...
1000644897.korean: 수영복 차림의 대원들을 보고 사령관님이 어떻게 반응할지...

1000644900.english: But what is it? Interview? How about my event instead of that?
1000644900.korean: 그런데 뭐야? 인터뷰? 그런 거 말고 내 행사는 어때?

1000644901.english: Huh? Didn't Salamander-san host a poker tournament?
1000644901.korean: 어? 샐러맨더 양이 주최했던 건 포커대회가 아니었나요?

1000644902.english: You have to change according to the flow, according to the atmosphere.

1000644903.english: My event right now is a bet to guess who the only winner of the swimsuit contest will be.
1000644903.korean: 지금 내 행사는 수영복 콘테스트의 유일한 우승자가 누군지 맞추는 내기야.

1000644904.english: Kyahahaha, easy to understand, right? Want to join?

1000644905.english: Could you please mute your microphone for a moment...? I'll bet on the Bloody Panther captain of the Armored Maidens.
1000644905.korean: 잠시 마이크 좀 끄고... 저는 아머드 메이든의 블러디팬서 대장님으로 걸게요.

1000644907.english: It varies depending on the unit. Give me the panel address. I'll send the dividend table there.
1000644907.korean: 각 부대마다 다른데? 패널 주소 줘봐. 거기로 배당표 보내줄게.

1000644909.english: Oh, our regular customer is here. What's going on this time?
1000644909.korean: 어이쿠, 단골 손님이 오셨군. 이번엔 어쩐 일이야?

1000644910.english: If there's a big game like this, I'm in too!

1000644911.english: How many people walked? I'm going to win back everything I lost before, and then some!
1000644911.korean: 몇 명이나 걸었어? 전에 잃었던 거, 이번에 왕창 따서 복구할 거야!

1000644913.english: Alright, take your time and have a good look.

1000644915.english: - As I asked BoRyeon and Audrey, a large-scale festival centered around a swimsuit contest was held.
1000644915.korean: - 보련과 오드리에게 부탁한대로, 수영복 콘테스트가 메인인 대규모 페스티벌이 개최됐다.

1000644916.english: - I never imagined it would become this big. How did you get everything ready?
1000644916.korean: - 이만한 규모가 될 줄은 상상도 못했는데. 어떻게 다 준비했지?

1000644917.english: Everyone who had free time helped out.

1000644918.english: That's right! Especially, Mr. Azaz and Dr. Yang helped me with utmost care.
1000644918.korean: 맞아요! 특히 아자즈 님과 닥터 양이 지극정성으로 도와주셨답니다~

1000644919.english: It seemed like he knew exactly what the customer was thinking.
1000644919.korean: 손님이 어떤 생각인지 다 알고 있는 것 같았어요.

1000644920.english: - Since we've been together for a long time, that could happen.
1000644920.korean: - 함께 해온 시간이 오래됐으니 그럴 수도 있겠다.

1000644921.english: - Anyway, since I was invited to be an honorary judge, one thing has made me uneasy.
1000644921.korean: - 그건 그렇고, 명예심사위원으로 초청 받으면서 불안한 점이 하나 생겼다.

1000644924.english: Don't mind the money. Don't worry about it, Commander.

1000644925.english: If the commander starts grading, things will get complicated, won't they?

1000644926.english: That's right, it's enough for the customer to just observe. The rest, Ms. Audrey and I will take care of.
1000644926.korean: 맞아요, 손님은 참관하는 걸로 충분해요. 나머지는 오드리 선생님과 제가 다 알아서 할게요.

1000644927.english: Just the fact that the commander attended increases the attention on the swimsuit contest, doesn't it?
1000644927.korean: 사령관이 참석한 것만으로도 수영복 콘테스트의 주목도가 올라가잖아요.

1000644928.english: It's about to start, can you see it?

1000644929.english: Hehe, so many people have applied to participate!
1000644929.korean: 헤헷, 정말 많은 분이 참가 신청해 주셨어요!

1000644930.english: - Just as BoRyeon and Audrey said, the front of the contest venue was bustling with crowds of people in unit formations.
1000644930.korean: - 보련과 오드리의 말대로 콘테스트장 앞은 부대 단위의 인파로 붐볐다.

1000644931.english: - Participants preparing in their swimsuits, as well as their friends and family who came to cheer them on. And with the branch's followers, and Angel, Azazel, and Veronica... Huh?
1000644931.korean: - 수영복을 입고 준비 중인 참가자들을 비롯해, 그들을 응원하려고 온 지인들. 그리고 지부의 신도들과 엔젤, 아자젤, 베로니카랑... 어?

1000644934.english: When the Kohei sect heard that the commander would be attending the swimsuit contest, they came and asked for a favor.
1000644934.korean: 사령관이 수영복 콘테스트를 참관한다는 말을 듣고 코헤이 교단 사람들이 찾아와서 부탁했어요.

1000644935.english: I'll be participating with Sarachael-san, so I'd like you to make a swimsuit for Ramiel-san as well.
1000644935.korean: 사라카엘 양이랑 같이 참여하게 라미엘 양의 수영복도 만들어 달라고요.

1000644936.english: - I didn't expect even Ramiel to participate...

1000644937.english: - BoRyeon chuckled and tapped my startled arm.
1000644937.korean: - 보련은 헤헤 웃으며 놀란 내 팔을 툭툭 쳤다.

1000644938.english: The deadline was before the contest, so you must have worked really hard, teacher!
1000644938.korean: 마감기한이 콘테스트 전까지라 선생님께서 고생 많이 하셨죠~

1000644939.english: I'm planning to take a break for a while after this contest is over. Obviously, I pushed myself a bit too hard.
1000644939.korean: 이번 콘테스트만 끝나면 당분간 레스트할 예정이에요. 오비어슬리, 조금 무리했거든요.

1000644940.english: The best contest the teacher and I have directed. Are you ready to enjoy, sir?
1000644940.korean: 선생님과 제가 연출한 최고의 콘테스트. 즐길 준비 되셨죠, 손님~?

1000644941.english: Alright, Ms. BoRyeon. Let's let everyone know it's about to start.
1000644941.korean: 자, 보련 양. 이제 곧 시작될 거라고 모두에게 알리죠.

1000644942.english: Yes, ah, microphone test. Microphone test.
1000644942.korean: 네~ 아아, 마이크 테스트. 마이크 테스트.

1000644943.english: Everyone, you've been waiting a long time... The swimsuit contest you've all been waiting for!
1000644943.korean: 여러분, 오래 기다리셨습니다... 기다리고 기다리셨던 수영복 콘테스트!

1000644945.english: - With BoRyeon's declaration, the atmosphere in the event hall instantly heated up.
