1000644945.korean: - 보련의 선언으로 행사장의 열기가 순식간에 달아올랐다.

1000644946.english: - Some members stepped forward and put their arms around the shoulders of the hesitant worshipers, who had been hesitating out of consideration for others, and they awkwardly responded.
1000644946.korean: - 눈치보느라 쭈뼛대던 신도들도 몇몇 대원이 나서 어깨동무를 하자 어색하게 호응했다.

1000644947.english: Haha, of course. Oh, by the way, Commander?

1000644948.english: "Whispered Audrey, so close our noses were touching."
1000644948.korean: - 코가 닿을 정도로 가까운 거리에서 오드리가 속삭였다.

1000644949.english: This is... This is the starting lineup we've decided on...

1000644951.english: - I was flustered because it was the first time I'd heard her captivating voice in public, and BoRyeon placed her hand on my thigh.
1000644951.korean: - 공개석상에서 고혹적인 목소리를 듣는 건 처음이라 당황한 내 허벅지에 보련이 손을 올렸다.

1000644952.english: What do you think, customer? Hehehe, slurp.

1000644953.english: - Was this situation with only three of us sitting here what they were aiming for?
1000644953.korean: - 셋만 앉아있는 이 상황을 노린 거였나.

1000644954.english: - Thinking of it as a reward for the two of them, I grabbed their waists on either side.
1000644954.korean: - 둘에게 주는 보상이라고 생각하고, 양 옆의 허리를 잡아챘다.

1000644956.english: Hmph, still wild today, are you?

1000644958.english: You're right... Could you please show me step by step what's not working?
1000644958.korean: 그러게요... 뭐가 안 되는지 하나하나, 직접 알려주시겠어요...?

1000644960.english: - At the same time, fireworks exploded, signaling the opening of the contest. Soon after, the participants began to take the stage one by one and start their self-introductions...
1000644960.korean: - 그와 동시에 콘테스트 개막을 알리는 폭죽이 터졌다. 곧이어 참가자들이 하나둘씩 올라서며 자기어필을 시작했는데...

1000644963.english: Are you watching? What if I fall for Poi again? Tteok (Korean rice cake) Ha. Ji♡
1000644963.korean: 보고 계시죠~? 포이한테 또 반해버리면 어.떡.하.지♡

1000644964.english: Hey, black cat! Isn't it going by quickly?
1000644964.korean: 야, 검은 고양이! 빨리 안 지나가?

1000644965.english: Other people are waiting behind you, hurry up!

1000644968.english: It's not a painful expression, but... Just like last night...

1000644971.english: How is it that there's no normal person here!

1000644973.english: S, victory! I'm Red Hood, the Steel Line's second-in-command.

1000644974.english: Co-Commander Gark? Your Excellency, I, um, I'm participating in the contest you attended...!
1000644974.korean: 사, 사령관 갉? 각하께서, 참, 참관하신 콘테스트에 참, 참여하게 되어...!

1000644975.english: Are you okay? You seem very nervous, Red Hood.
1000644975.korean: 괜찮으세요? 많이 긴장하신 것 같아요, 레드후드님.

1000644976.english: Taking deep breaths is a good way to relax.
1000644976.korean: 긴장을 푸시려면 심호흡을 크게 하는 게 좋아요.

1000644978.english: Laughing out loud helps you relax. Want to give it a try?
1000644978.korean: 크게 웃으면 긴장이 풀려. 한번 해볼래?

1000644980.english: Thank you. Thanks to you, I've calmed down.

1000644986.english: This is hard to choose between, isn't it?

1000644988.english: - Curious to see who got the highest score, I tried to check the scores, but BoRyeon and Audrey hid the scoring sheet.
1000644988.korean: - 누가 높은 점수를 받았는지 궁금해 점수를 확인하려 하자, 보련과 오드리가 채점표를 숨겼다.

1000644989.english: Unbelievable! Behave like a gentleman, Commander!

1000644990.english: That's right, the scorecard is the judge's honor. You can't show it to anyone, sir.
1000644990.korean: 맞아요, 채점표는 심사위원의 명예. 누구에게도 보여줄 수 없어요, 손님.

1000644992.english: Alright, the next participant is the final contestant of this contest. They're from the Kohei sect.
1000644992.korean: 자, 다음 차례는 이번 콘테스트의 마지막 참가자. 코헤이 교단 분들이네요.

1000644993.english: - Looking straight ahead, Saraqael and Ramiel were ascending. The angels, Azazel, Veronica, and the worshipers who were sitting in the audience greeted them with applause.
1000644993.korean: - 정면을 바라보자 사라카엘과 라미엘이 올라오고 있었다. 객석에 앉아있던 엔젤과 아자젤, 베로니카와 신도들이 그들을 박수로 맞이했다.

1000644994.english: It's a masterpiece by me and Ms. BoRyeon.

1000644996.english: - Audrey, who readily granted a request that even I thought was unreasonable. Let's see. And I thanked all the crew members of the Orca.
1000644996.korean: - 내가 생각해도 무리한 부탁을 흔쾌히 들어준 오드리. 보련. 그리고 오르카 호의 모든 대원에게 감사했다.

1000644997.english: - But it's a bit much to reach this far, isn't it?
1000644997.korean: - 하지만 여기까지 손이 들어오는 건 좀 그렇지 않나.

1000644998.english: - He firmly pushed their hands away.

1000645000.english: I also wanted to participate in the swimsuit contest, but...

1000645001.english: No, you can't. Because if Lord Azazel were to be seen looking relaxed and smiling at the Savior in such a public place, the honor of the order would be ruined.
1000645001.korean: 안 됩니다. 이런 공개적인 장소에서 아자젤님이 구원자님을 보고 풀어진 모습을 보이면 교단의 명예는 땅에 떨어질테니까요.

1000645002.english: Still... haven't you received the Savior's blessing?

1000645005.english: That expression right now is a relaxed one.
1000645005.korean: 바로 지금 그 표정이 풀어진 표정입니다.

1000645006.english: Hehe, everyone gets along so well...

1000645007.english: Oh, there's Saraqael and Ramiel entering over there!
1000645007.korean: 앗, 저기 사라카엘님이랑 라미엘님이 입장하고 계세요!

1000645010.english: Stop hesitating and come up, Ramiel.

1000645012.english: Even if it's the outfit the Savior wanted... This is the first time I've worn anything other than the scroll with the Word of Light written on it...
1000645012.korean: 아무리 구원자님이 바라던 의상이라 해도... 빛의 말씀이 적힌 스크롤 이외의 것을 걸친 건 처음이라...

1000645014.english: As an angel who serves his will, show a dignified appearance.
1000645014.korean: 그의 의지를 받드는 천사로서 당당한 모습을 보여라.

1000645018.english: Even if the Savior has forgiven my sins, I am still, above all else, a filthy being...
1000645018.korean: 구원자님께서 제 죄를 사해주셨다고 해도 저는 무엇보다 더러운 존재...

1000645019.english: Even if I, who am like that, were to wear the most beautiful clothes...
1000645019.korean: 그런 제가 아무리 아름다운 옷을 걸친다고 해도...

1000645021.english: Sa, Saraqael. Why are you looking at me like that...?
1000645021.korean: 사, 사라카엘. 왜 그런 눈으로 저를...

1000645022.english: Do you think the savior would be concerned with such things?
1000645022.korean: 구원자가 그런 것에 연연할 것 같은가.
